title: "l" shape desk 6 sizes 13 colours — 6 sizes
body_html:
A workhorse L-shape desk built to handle the daily demands of a private office or open-plan environment — in six sizes and thirteen colour options.

This L-shape desk series combines thermally fused laminate construction with clean, modular design to deliver a practical desking solution that fits a wide range of workspace configurations. The 1" thick top with matching 2 mm edge banding holds up to daily use and resists wear, while levelling glides keep the surface stable on uneven floors. Available in six sizes and thirteen laminate colours, it adapts to the footprint and aesthetic of virtually any office setting. Assembly is straightforward, and each unit can be configured for left- or right-hand orientation to suit the room layout.

Key features

  • Thermally fused laminate top, 1" thick, for a durable and consistent work surface.
  • 2 mm matching edge banding for a clean, finished look on all exposed edges.
  • Available in six sizes to fit private offices, open-plan stations, and shared workspaces.
  • Thirteen laminate colour options to coordinate with existing office interiors.
  • Levelling glides included for stability on uneven floors.
  • Configurable for left- or right-hand applications during assembly.
  • Modular design supports easy reconfiguration as workspace needs change.

Who it's for

Office administrators, facilities managers, and procurement teams outfitting private offices, open-plan floors, or multi-person work areas. Well suited for SMB offices, non-profit organizations, municipal offices, and family health teams furnishing practical, budget-conscious workstations.

Brant Business Interiors serves buyers across Ontario from 5 locations, with delivery and installation available province-wide. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times, colour samples, and free design layouts.

title: 2600 series 4 drawer vertical file, legal (26-451) — 4 drawer
body_html:
A four-drawer legal-size vertical file that handles a serious workload without the filing-cabinet price tag.

The 2600 Series Vertical File (model 26-451) is built for offices that file frequently and need dependable, full-extension access to every document in the cabinet. Legal-size drawers accommodate folders up to 15 inches wide, and full-extension ball-bearing suspensions mean every drawer rolls smoothly from front to back — no reaching, no stacking documents at the back hoping they stay put. Standard drawer pulls and a thumb latch keep access straightforward and consistent across the unit. At 18.15" W × 26.56" D × 52" H, the four-drawer configuration makes efficient use of vertical space while keeping a relatively compact footprint on the floor.

Key features

  • Model 26-451: four-drawer legal-size vertical file cabinet.
  • Dimensions: 18.15" W × 26.56" D × 52" H.
  • Legal file size accommodates wide-format folders and hanging files.
  • Full-extension ball-bearing drawer suspensions for smooth, complete access.
  • Standard drawer pulls and thumb latch included on each drawer.
  • Commercial-grade construction designed for daily, high-frequency use.

Who it's for

Office administrators, records coordinators, and operations staff at municipalities, health teams, non-profits, and private-sector firms who need reliable legal-size filing capacity without over-specifying on price. Well-suited for shared filing rooms, private offices, or any department that manages ongoing paper records.

title: 4 drawer letter width vertical file — 4 drawer
body_html:
A four-drawer vertical file that holds letter-width documents, locks down, and gets out of your way.

Built from steel with commercial-grade construction, this 4-drawer letter-width vertical file is sized at 15.15"W × 25"D × 52"H and weighs 112 lbs — substantial enough to stay planted in a busy office. Ball bearing suspension keeps every drawer opening and closing smoothly over years of daily use, and full-height side walls mean hanging file frames are not required. Drawer fronts feature a recessed angled full pull for a clean, professional appearance. A standard lock secures all drawers, and an optional Follower Block is available to keep files upright when the drawer isn't full. Meets or exceeds ANSI/BIFMA standards for commercial durability.

Key features

  • Metal construction, 4-drawer letter-width vertical configuration.
  • Dimensions: 15.15"W × 25"D × 52"H; weight 112 lbs / 50.8 kg.
  • Ball bearing suspension for smooth, reliable drawer operation.
  • Full-height side walls eliminate the need for hanging file frames.
  • Recessed angled full-width drawer pull on each drawer front.
  • Standard lock included; secures all drawers.
  • Optional Follower Block available to support partially filled drawers.
  • Meets or exceeds ANSI/BIFMA standards.

Who it's for

Office administrators at municipal offices, band offices, school boards, health teams, and non-profits who need reliable, lockable letter-file storage. Also suited to private-sector offices in professional services, logistics, and trades where document volume demands a full four-drawer tower.

title: 4 person workstation
body_html:
Four workstations, one cohesive system — built for open-plan offices that need structure without clutter.

The Newland 4 Person Workstation brings modular desking into open-plan environments with a clean, panel-based layout that keeps teams organized and focused. Each station features a 30" × 54" thermally fused laminate top with a 1" thick surface and matching 2mm edge detail throughout. A full-height modesty panel recessed 6.5" provides privacy without closing off the floor, while 12" high panels define each workspace without boxing it in. Sold in eaches — order 4 to complete the cluster. Monitor arms are sold separately.

Key features

  • Each station: 30" × 54" top with 12" high panels.
  • Thermally fused laminate surfaces throughout.
  • 1" thick top and end gables for commercial-grade durability.
  • All surfaces finished with a 2mm matching edge banding.
  • Full-height modesty panel recessed 6.5" for under-desk privacy.
  • Wire management included to keep cabling off work surfaces.
  • Modular Newland system — compatible with a wide range of workspace configurations.
  • Sold in eaches; order 4 units to complete the 4-person cluster.

Who it's for

Office managers and facilities coordinators outfitting open-plan work areas in professional services firms, municipal offices, non-profits, and growing SMBs who need a clean, durable desking solution that scales with their team.

title: Aeramax air purifier - true hepa, plasmatrue
body_html:
Clean air in the office shouldn't be an afterthought — the AeraMax® Air Purifier keeps shared workspaces genuinely breathable year-round.

The AeraMax® Air Purifier combines True HEPA filtration with PlasmaTrue™ ionization technology to capture airborne particles, allergens, and pollutants in commercial and institutional workspaces. The built-in AeraSmart™ sensor continuously monitors air quality and automatically adjusts fan speed, so the unit does the work without requiring manual intervention. When allergy season or cold and flu season hits, Aera+™ mode increases air changes by 50% to help maintain a healthier environment for staff and visitors.

Key features

  • True HEPA filtration captures airborne particles, allergens, and pollutants at a commercial-grade level.
  • PlasmaTrue™ Technology: optional ionization setting that helps safely remove airborne contaminants.
  • AeraSmart™ sensor monitors air quality in real time and automatically adjusts fan speed to maintain purified air.
  • Aera+™ mode increases air change rate by 50% for allergy and cold/flu seasons.
  • Quiet auto-adjusting operation minimises disruption in open-plan offices, private offices, and meeting rooms.

Who it's for

Office administrators, facilities managers, and health-sector procurement teams looking to improve indoor air quality in shared workspaces — including waiting rooms, staff offices, school board meeting rooms, and band office reception areas. A practical addition to any workspace where staff density or seasonal illness is a concern.

Brant Business Interiors supplies commercial-grade accessories and workspace solutions from 5 Ontario locations, with delivery available across Ontario. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current availability, compatible filter replacements, and free design layouts.

title: Anti-fatigue wellness mat — 36" x 24"
body_html:
The mat that makes a stand-up workday actually sustainable.

Standing desks and sit-stand workstations only deliver their full benefit when your feet and joints aren't bearing the brunt of hard flooring. The Fellowes Anti-Fatigue Wellness Mat (FEL8707002 / 8707002) pairs a 36" × 24" footprint with a contoured surface designed to encourage subtle, continuous micro-movement — the kind that keeps circulation going and reduces lower-body fatigue during extended standing sessions. Beveled edges run the perimeter to eliminate trip hazards, making it a practical fit for shared offices, reception areas, and any workstation where multiple people rotate through the standing position.

Key features

  • Model: FEL8707002 (Manufacturer Ref: 8707002) by Fellowes, Inc.
  • Dimensions: 36" × 24" — sized for single-user sit-stand workstations.
  • Contoured surface encourages subtle movement to reduce fatigue during prolonged standing.
  • Beveled edges on all sides help prevent trip hazards in shared or high-traffic areas.
  • Compatible with any sit-stand desk or height-adjustable workstation.
  • Durable construction designed for daily commercial use.

Who it's for

Office managers equipping sit-stand workstations in open-plan offices, reception areas, or shared work environments where employees stand for extended periods. Also a practical add-on purchase alongside any height-adjustable desk order.

title: Array stand as air purifier
body_html:
Clean air, continuously monitored — built for the offices and shared spaces where people spend their days.

The Array® Stand AS Air Purifier (models AS1 and AS2) brings commercial-grade air purification to open offices, reception areas, and high-occupancy workspaces. The AS1 covers spaces up to 1,800 sq ft; the AS2 scales to 3,000 sq ft — both using 3-stage filtration rated 99.95% effective at capturing viruses, allergens, and particles as small as 0.1 microns. EnviroSmart+™ Technology keeps the unit working in the background, adjusting continuously based on contaminant levels, occupancy, and noise — no manual adjustments required.

Key features

  • 3-stage filtration rated 99.95% effective against viruses, allergens, and particulates as small as 0.1 microns.
  • AS1 coverage: up to 1,800 sq ft; AS2 coverage: up to 3,000 sq ft.
  • EnviroSmart+™ Technology automatically responds to changes in contaminants, occupancy, and noise levels.
  • IAQ sensors monitor PM10, PM2.5, temperature, pressure, humidity (RH), CO2, and TVOCs.
  • Integrated Lookout display provides real-time air quality status at a glance.
  • Connects to the Array® Viewpoint cloud platform for remote monitoring and reporting.
  • Free-standing design — no ceiling or wall installation required.

Who it's for

Well suited for Ontario offices, municipal buildings, school board facilities, family health teams, and any shared workplace where indoor air quality affects staff comfort and productivity. Both coverage tiers make the AS series practical for smaller private offices and larger open-plan floors alike.

Brant Business Interiors carries the Array® Stand AS series and delivers across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times, coverage recommendations, and free design layouts.

title: Basics comfort-time ultra multi-tilter chairs MVL1873 MVL1875 (available with a headrest)
body_html:
A high-back task chair built for long days at a desk, with memory foam comfort and the adjustability to match almost any sitter.

The Basics® Comfort-Time™ Ultra Multi-Tilter (MVL1873 / MVL1875) is engineered for full-day seated work. The seat combines variable-density foam with a memory foam top layer, distributing weight evenly and reducing pressure over extended hours. A concealed ratchet back-height adjustment and sliding seat depth let each user dial in a precise fit, while infinite-position tilt lock gives you freedom to recline or lock the chair exactly where you need it — including forward tilt positions that support active, leaning-in postures. The Fusion Fabric upholstery on a carbon-finish 5-star base keeps the look clean and the maintenance straightforward. An optional headrest (MVL1875) is available for users who need additional neck and upper-back support.

Key features

  • High-back design with variable-density foam seat and memory foam top layer for extended comfort.
  • Concealed ratchet back-height adjustment for a personalized fit.
  • Sliding seat depth adjustment to accommodate different leg lengths.
  • Infinite-position back and seat angle adjustment, including forward tilt.
  • Infinite-position tilt lock — chair can tilt freely or lock at any recline angle.
  • Fusion Fabric upholstery on a carbon-finish 5-star base.
  • Adjustable armrests included.
  • Available with an optional headrest (MVL1875).

Who it's for

Office managers and procurement teams sourcing full-day task seating for private offices, administrative workstations, or open-plan environments. A solid choice for organizations standardizing on ergonomic seating across multiple workstations without moving into a fully custom ergonomic program.

title: Caster options
body_html:
The right caster makes the difference between a chair that moves with you and one that fights you all day.

Caster options from Brant Business Interiors are designed to match your flooring type, chair base, and load requirements — so your seating performs the way it should from day one. Whether you're outfitting a hard-surface office floor, a carpeted workroom, or a mixed-surface environment, selecting the correct caster prevents floor damage, reduces rolling resistance, and extends the life of your chair. These are commercial-grade replacements and upgrades suited to task chairs, executive seating, and heavy-duty applications across a wide range of environments.

Key features

  • Available in hard-floor and carpet-specific variants to protect flooring surfaces.
  • Commercial-grade construction rated for sustained daily use in office environments.
  • Standard stem sizing compatible with most task and executive chair bases.
  • Smooth-rolling design reduces effort and minimizes wear on chair mechanisms.
  • Suitable as factory upgrades or field-replaceable parts on existing seating.

Who it's for

Office managers and facilities coordinators specifying new seating packages or replacing worn casters on existing chairs — particularly in high-traffic workrooms, open-plan offices, and multi-shift environments where floor protection and chair mobility matter.

Brant Business Interiors supplies and installs across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 to confirm compatible caster options and current lead times for your seating order.

title: Ceiling baffles sound acoustic dampeners
body_html:
Ceiling baffles that bring the noise down without getting in the way of your ceiling grid.

Open-plan offices, training rooms, and multi-use facilities generate reflected sound that compounds throughout the day. Suspended vertically from the ceiling structure, these acoustic baffles intercept sound waves at the source — before they bounce off hard surfaces and stack into the background noise that wears people down. Unlike wall panels, baffles work in spaces where floor-to-ceiling coverage isn't practical, making them a straightforward retrofit for existing offices, boardrooms, and classrooms without major renovation.

Key features

  • Vertical suspension design absorbs mid- and high-frequency reflected sound.
  • Installs directly from ceiling grid or structure with standard hanging hardware.
  • Suitable for open-plan offices, training rooms, boardrooms, and multi-use spaces.
  • Lightweight construction simplifies installation without structural modification.
  • Available in a range of sizes and colour options to coordinate with interior finishes.
  • Commercial-grade acoustic fabric wrapped over rigid core for long-term durability.

Who it's for

Facilities managers and office administrators in schools, municipal offices, health teams, and open-plan commercial workplaces where noise control is a priority but wall space or budget for a full acoustic renovation is limited. An effective, low-disruption solution for spaces that need measurable acoustic improvement quickly.

Brant Business Interiors serves institutional and commercial buyers from 5 Ontario locations with delivery and installation available across the province. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times, available sizes, and free design layouts.

title: Ceiling grids sound acoustic dampeners
body_html:
Open offices work better when sound has somewhere to go.

Ceiling-mounted acoustic dampeners are one of the most practical tools for managing noise in open-plan offices, collaborative workspaces, and busy reception areas. These panels mount directly to standard ceiling grids and work by absorbing ambient sound before it bounces off hard surfaces — reducing echo, lowering background noise levels, and making conversation easier across the entire floor. Constructed from 12mm felt, each panel has a clean, modern profile that sits quietly in the ceiling rather than calling attention to itself. Available in multiple colours and sizes to suit your layout and finish preferences, they can be specified as a standalone addition or as part of a broader acoustic strategy alongside wall panels or privacy screens. Ceiling attachment hardware is available separately for a variety of ceiling types — contact the team directly at Furnorders@officecentral.com for hardware details specific to your installation.

Key features

  • 12mm felt construction designed specifically for sound dampening.
  • Available in multiple colours and sizes to suit different open-plan layouts.
  • Mounts to standard ceiling grids for a low-profile, professional appearance.
  • Reduces echo and ambient noise in open offices, reception areas, and collaborative spaces.
  • Ceiling attachment hardware available separately for a variety of ceiling types.
  • Modern, unobtrusive profile that integrates cleanly with commercial interior finishes.

Who it's for

Office managers and facilities teams addressing noise challenges in open-plan offices, non-profit workspaces, school board administrative areas, municipal offices, and any commercial environment where sound control is a priority.

Brant Business Interiors supplies and installs across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times, colour and size options, and free design layouts.

title: Chevron ultra high back multi-tilter chair - high back — BAO11203
body_html:
A high-back ergonomic chair built for long days at the desk — and the adjustments to prove it.

The Basics® Chevron Ultra™ Multi-Tilter Chair (model BAO11203) delivers a full range of ergonomic controls in a professional high-back design suited to private offices, workstations, and administrative environments. Soft Descent™ pneumatic seat height adjustment lets users dial in the right position without jarring drops, while independent seat and back angle controls allow genuine customization to individual posture needs. The upholstered high back provides support through the lumbar and upper spine during extended seated work. Height- and width-adjustable arms with articulating arm caps reduce shoulder strain across a range of tasks. Hard floor casters are included as standard.

Key features

  • Model BAO11203 — Basics® Chevron Ultra™ Multi-Tilter, ultra high back configuration.
  • Soft Descent™ pneumatic seat height adjustment for smooth, controlled positioning.
  • Seat depth adjustment to accommodate a range of user body types.
  • Independent seat and back angle adjustment with infinitely adjustable seat angle.
  • Adjustable back angle and back height adjustment for personalized lumbar support.
  • Tilt tension adjustment to match recline resistance to user preference.
  • Height- and width-adjustable arms with articulating arm caps.
  • Hard floor casters included as standard.
  • Fabric upholstery on seat and back.

Who it's for

Office administrators, executive assistants, and private-office professionals who spend the majority of their workday seated and need a chair with meaningful ergonomic range — not just a height adjustment. Also suited to procurement managers outfitting multiple workstations where consistent ergonomic compliance matters.

Brant Business Interiors supplies and installs across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 to confirm ergonomic options and finishes for your space.

title: Credenza scmsu
body_html:
A full-width credenza built for the organized private office — locking storage, deep drawers, and a clean work surface in one unit.

The Credenza SCMSU gives private offices and executive suites a hardworking surface without the clutter. At 72 inches wide, 22 inches deep, and 29 inches high, it spans a full wall run and sits flush to standard desk height, making it a natural extension of any workstation or stand-alone credenza wall. Two doors conceal interior storage for binders, supplies, and equipment, while the multi-drawer unit keeps documents sorted and within reach. Full-suspension glides mean every drawer opens smoothly under a full load, not just when it's empty. Locks are included on all compartments — no retrofit required, no separate hardware order.

Key features

  • Dimensions: 72" W × 22" D × 29" H.
  • Two-door storage compartment for supplies, binders, and equipment.
  • Multi-drawer unit with full-suspension glides for smooth, full-extension operation.
  • Locks included on all compartments — no additional hardware required.
  • Work-surface height (29") aligns with standard desk configurations.
  • Model: SCMSU.

Who it's for

Office managers and administrative coordinators outfitting private offices, executive suites, or team workrooms where organized, lockable storage is a daily requirement. Well suited to professional services firms, municipal offices, and any environment where confidential documents need to stay secure.

Brant Business Interiors delivers and installs across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times and free design layouts.

title: D-top table with or without modesty
body_html:
A solid, Canadian-made boardroom or meeting table built for the offices that actually use them.

The D-Top Table is a straightforward workhorse for meeting rooms, private offices, and collaborative workspaces. The distinctive D-shaped top pairs cleanly with metal legs for a professional silhouette that holds up to daily use. An optional ¾" modesty panel keeps the space looking organized while providing under-table privacy — a practical detail for client-facing rooms and open-plan settings alike. Available in multiple sizes and colours to suit your floor plan and finish palette.

Key features

  • D-shaped top profile suited to boardroom, meeting, and training configurations.
  • Optional ¾" modesty panel for under-table privacy and a finished appearance.
  • Metal leg base provides stable, commercial-grade support.
  • Available in multiple sizes to fit a range of room footprints.
  • Multiple colour options to coordinate with existing office furniture.
  • Made in Canada.

Who it's for

Office managers and procurement teams outfitting boardrooms, meeting rooms, or private offices in commercial, institutional, or municipal settings. A practical choice wherever a durable, presentable meeting table is needed without unnecessary complexity.

Brant Business Interiors carries and installs the D-Top Table across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times, size and colour options, and free design layouts.

title: Desk single pedestal bbf
body_html:
A solid single-pedestal desk built for the day-to-day grind of a working office.

Available in five sizes — from a compact 24" x 48" up to a full 36" x 72" — this single-pedestal desk fits private offices, administrative workstations, and support staff areas where reliable storage and a clean work surface matter most. The right-side Box/Box/File (BBF) pedestal puts everyday essentials within reach without crowding the floor plan. One-inch construction throughout gives the unit genuine durability for long-term, high-use environments.

Key features

  • Available sizes: 24" x 48", 30" x 48", 30" x 60", 30" x 72", and 36" x 72".
  • Right-side BBF pedestal — two box drawers plus one file drawer.
  • Full-suspension drawers for smooth, reliable operation under daily use.
  • 1" panel construction for a sturdy, commercial-grade feel.
  • Straightforward rectangular footprint suits a range of private-office and workstation layouts.

Who it's for

Office administrators, administrative assistants, and support staff at SMB firms, municipal offices, non-profits, and family health teams who need a dependable, right-hand-storage desk without excess bulk. Works equally well as a secondary workstation in a private office or as the primary desk in a compact admin area.

title: Desktop sit-stand workstation — MVL5230B0
body_html:
A sit-stand workstation that turns any desk into an active workspace — no tools, no contractor, no downtime.

The MVL5230B0 desktop sit-stand workstation mounts directly on top of your existing worksurface, giving you 13.8" of height adjustability without replacing your desk. At a weight light enough to move between workstations, it suits shared or rotating office environments where flexibility matters. The black frame and surface integrate cleanly into most office settings, and a built-in grommet keeps cabling tidy as you shift between sitting and standing throughout the day.

Key features

  • Model: MVL5230B0.
  • 13.8" of height adjustability for sit-to-stand transitions.
  • Fits worksurfaces 24" deep or deeper — no modifications required.
  • Supports up to 35 lbs. of monitor and equipment load.
  • Keyboard surface tilts from -10° to +10° for wrist comfort.
  • No tools required for installation or repositioning.
  • Grommet included for cord management.
  • Black frame and surface finish.

Who it's for

Office managers and workplace administrators looking to introduce ergonomic sit-stand options without a full desk replacement — ideal for open-plan offices, shared workstations, or budget-conscious retrofits in schools, clinics, municipal offices, and private-sector workplaces.

body_html:

  • Allows a maximum load of 11.34 kg, ensuring complete protection of your equipment
  • multipurpose desktop riser - Perfect in size to make viewing extremely comfortable. Also, supports up to 25"

Transform any sit-down desk into a sitting or stand-up desk with the DC450 Electronic Standing Desk Workstation. The 28" wide x 23" deep worksurface is raised up to 20" for ergonomic placement of monitor, keyboard, mouse, telephone and papers while standing. Electric motor design allows easy custom height adjustment with the push of a button. Monitor holder is also height-adjustable with a range of 12-1/2". To switch to sitting position, simply push a button and lower the surface down to desktop level. Safety Sensor stops movement when obstacles are detected under the desk. Sleek wood construction and a durable laminate coating provide years of use with a modern style. Sturdy steel base and aluminum tower are built to last. This standing desk converter rests on top of any desk or table. With no attachments to tie you down, it easily repositions. It holds two monitors up 27" wide and up to 12.5 lb. each. Standard VESA mounting holes are required.

title: Electric height adjustable sit to stand desks
body_html:
A sit-to-stand desk that handles a full workday without drama — quiet, precise, and built to commercial-grade spec.

These electric height-adjustable desks run on a dual synchronized motor system with a heavy-duty 3-stage steel frame, giving each leg consistent, stable travel from 22" to 47.5" (not including the 1" top). The actuator moves at 1.2" per second and operates under 55 dB — quiet enough for open offices and private suites alike. CSA/UL Certified, anti-collision protected, and backed by a limited lifetime warranty on laminates and a 15-year warranty on the mechanical components, these are built for sustained commercial use, not a home-office trial run. Frames are available in Silver (SL) or Black (BL) to suit most office finish schemes.

Key features

  • Height range: 22" – 47.5" (not including 1" top).
  • Heavy-duty 3-stage steel frame with dual synchronized motor driving each leg.
  • Operating speed: 1.2" per second; noise level under 55 dB.
  • Anti-collision function for safety in shared and open environments.
  • 4 programmable memory positions for multi-user workstations.
  • 2-leg base: 265 lb weight capacity; 3-leg base: 320 lb weight capacity.
  • Frame finish: Silver (SL) or Black (BL).
  • CSA/UL Certified; limited lifetime warranty on laminates, 15-year warranty on frame components.
  • Includes adjustable glides; quick fold-out assembly.

Who it's for

Office managers and facilities coordinators sourcing sit-to-stand solutions for private offices, open-plan workstations, or ergonomic upgrade programs — including municipalities, school boards, health teams, and Ontario SMB firms where certified, warrantied commercial furniture is a procurement requirement.

Brant Business Interiors carries these desks across 5 Ontario locations with delivery and installation available province-wide. Call 1-800-835-9565 to confirm current configurations, top options, and lead times.

title: Ergo boss high back multi-tilter chair
body_html:
The chair that supports your back through a full day of focused work.

The Ergo Boss™ High Back Multi-Tilter Chair is built for private offices and workstations where long hours demand real ergonomic support. The high-back design provides full spinal coverage from lumbar to upper back, while the multi-tilt mechanism lets the seat and back move together for natural, dynamic sitting. At 25.5"W × 25"D × 41.5"H, it fits a range of standard office configurations without overwhelming the space.

Key features

  • High-back design with full lumbar and upper-back support for extended sit sessions.
  • Multi-tilt mechanism allows coordinated seat-and-back movement for active sitting comfort.
  • Dimensions: 25.5" W × 25" D × 41.5" H overall.
  • Commercial-grade construction suited to daily, full-time use in private office environments.
  • Upholstered seating surface designed for all-day occupancy.
  • Chair height adjustable via pneumatic lift for a range of user heights.

Who it's for

Well-suited for office managers, directors, and administrative leads who spend the majority of their day at a desk. A practical choice for private offices in municipalities, professional services firms, non-profits, and healthcare administration settings where seating durability and comfort are both priorities.

Brant Business Interiors serves buyers across Ontario from 5 locations, with delivery and installation available province-wide. Call 1-800-835-9565 to confirm ergonomic options and finishes for your space.

title: Executive u-shape desk set
body_html:
A complete executive workspace built for the demands of a full-time private office.

The Executive U-Shape Desk Set brings together five coordinated pieces — desk, bridge return, credenza, hutch with doors, and a pedestal drawer set — into one cohesive, high-capacity workstation. The full floor footprint measures 108" × 72", giving you a working surface that handles dual monitors, document review, and client-facing meetings without feeling crowded. Available in 8 colour options, this set integrates into a wide range of office environments without a custom order. Each component is sold as a matched set, so finishes and proportions align out of the box.

Key features

  • Set includes: Desk (INV3072DS), Bridge Return (INV2448SRBR), Credenza (INV2472SH), Hutch with Doors (INV3672H+DRS), and Drawers — 1 set (INVFPUF).
  • Total floor footprint: 108" × 72".
  • Available in 8 colour options to suit a range of interior finishes.
  • U-shape configuration provides separate zones for primary work, reference materials, and storage.
  • Hutch with doors keeps supplies and binders concealed for a cleaner desk environment.
  • Credenza adds lateral surface area and closed storage at standing height.
  • Pedestal drawer unit supports file and supply organization within arm's reach.

Who it's for

Private-office managers, directors, and senior administrators who need a durable, fully configured executive workstation — and want the procurement simplicity of ordering all components as a matched set.

Brant Business Interiors serves buyers across Ontario from 5 locations, with delivery and installation available. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times, available colour samples, and free design layouts.

title: Format | high back synchro-tilter with adjustable headrest chair — MVL3192
body_html:
The chair that keeps you supported through a full workday — back, neck, and everything in between.

The Format High Back Synchro-Tilter (MVL3192) is a task chair built for private offices and workstations where people spend serious time at their desks. A synchro-tilt mechanism keeps the seat and back moving in coordinated recline, reducing lower-back strain during long sessions. The adjustable headrest addresses what most mid-back chairs miss entirely — proper cervical support for extended focus work. Height-adjustable ratchet back, tilt-lock, and tilt-tension controls let each user dial in their own fit without calling facilities.

Key features

  • Synchro-tilt mechanism for coordinated seat and back recline.
  • Ratchet back height adjustment for personalized lumbar positioning.
  • Adjustable headrest for cervical and neck support.
  • Upright tilt-lock and tilt-tension adjustment.
  • Height- and width-adjustable arms with soft-skinned urethane arm caps that slide forward and backward.
  • Pneumatic seat height adjustment.
  • Dual-wheel carpet casters for smooth, controlled movement.

Who it's for

Office managers and procurement administrators outfitting private offices, management workstations, or any environment where staff spend the majority of their day seated. A practical step up from standard task seating when adjustability and neck support are a priority.

Brant Business Interiors serves buyers across Ontario from 5 locations, with delivery and installation available province-wide. Call 1-800-835-9565 to confirm ergonomic options, fabric and finish selections, and current lead times for MVL3192.

A synchro-tilt mechanism keeps the seat and back moving in a coordinated recline, reducing pressure on the lower back as you shift through the day.

The Foundations Sport Splash Quad Stroller is designed for childcare professionals who need to move multiple children safely and efficiently. Who it's for

title: Granada deluxe high back multi-tilter (1170-3) — 1170-3
body_html:
• Tension Adjustment: Increase or decrease to match body weight. Allows you to rock comfortably, without heavy pushing, reducing muscle fatigue.
  • Chair Tilt Lock: Lock the tilt movement in position(s) to accommodate your working posture. Allows you to lock your chair in a comfortable and supportive position (can be either single position or infinite style).
  • Seat Height: Raise or lower to allow your feet to rest flat on the floor. Avoids pressure under your thighs, easing blood flow.
  • Back/Lumbar Height: Raise or lower to position lumbar support in your lumbar area. Reduces likelihood of back pain.
  • Seat Depth: Change the depth of the seat to accommodate the length of your thighs. Keeps your back in contact with the backrest while avoiding pressure behind your knees.
  • Seat Angle Adjustment: Forward and/or rearward. Allows chair to tilt forward and/or rearward changing the angle of your thighs in relation to the floor. Helps reduce disc pressure during forward leaning tasks.
  • Back Angle: Adjust to change the angle of your torso in relation to your thighs. Helps reduce disc pressure and relaxes your back muscles.
  • Arm Height: Raise or lower to support your forearms. Reduces muscular effort in neck and shoulders, minimizing risk of pain.
  • Waterfall Seat Edge: Reduces pressure at the back of the knee, contributing to good blood flow.
  • Properly Contoured Cushions: Support the body effectively, allowing you to sit longer without discomfort.
  • Dimensions: W26 x D23.5 x H45 IN.

title: Ibex | mesh seat & back multi-tilter
body_html:
A full-mesh task chair built for long shifts and honest work.

The Ibex Mesh Seat & Back Multi-Tilter is a practical, ventilated task chair designed for office environments where people are seated for most of the day. The mesh seat and back promote airflow, reducing heat build-up during extended use — a straightforward advantage in any busy office. The multi-tilter mechanism gives the user real control over recline tension and movement, supporting a range of postures without requiring constant manual adjustment. Clean lines and a professional silhouette make it a comfortable fit in open-plan offices, private workstations, and team environments alike.

Key features

  • Full mesh seat and back for sustained airflow and comfort during extended use.
  • Multi-tilter mechanism with adjustable recline tension for personalized movement control.
  • Seat height adjustable via pneumatic lift to accommodate a range of user heights.
  • Contoured mesh back provides lumbar support without added bulk.
  • Durable five-star base for stability across standard commercial flooring.
  • Professional, neutral aesthetic suitable for private offices, workstations, and collaborative areas.

Who it's for

Office managers and procurement coordinators equipping private offices, open-plan workstations, or team areas where staff are seated for long periods. A reliable mid-range task chair for Canadian SMB offices, non-profits, and municipal or administrative work environments where comfort and durability both matter.

Brant Business Interiors serves clients across Ontario from 5 locations, with delivery and installation available province-wide. Call 1-800-835-9565 to confirm ergonomic options and finishes for your space.

title: Ibex | upholstered seat & mesh back multi-tilter — MVL2803
body_html:
A mesh-back task chair built for full days at the desk, without the afternoon ache.

The Ibex Multi-Tilter (MVL2803) pairs a breathable air-flow mesh back with a fully upholstered seat — two materials working together where each performs best. Mesh at the back keeps air moving and reduces heat build-up during long sessions. Upholstery at the seat cushions contact pressure where you need it most. The multi-tilt mechanism lets you shift posture throughout the day, with infinite position lock so you stay where you set it. It is a straightforward, well-executed task chair for private offices and open-plan workstations that need dependable ergonomic support without a complicated setup.

Key features

  • Model MVL2803 multi-tilter mechanism with infinite position tilt lock.
  • Air-flow mesh back supports ventilation and reduces heat build-up over long work periods.
  • Fully upholstered seat cushion for sustained seated comfort.
  • Classic mesh back design suited to both private office and open-plan environments.
  • Adjustable seat height via pneumatic cylinder for a range of user heights.

Who it's for

Office managers and procurement leads sourcing mid-range task seating for staff workstations, private offices, or shared desk environments in business, professional services, or light industrial settings.

Brant Business Interiors carries the Ibex line across 5 Ontario locations with delivery and installation available province-wide. Call 1-800-835-9565 to confirm ergonomic options and finishes for your space.

title: Indestructible ryno furniture
body_html:
Built for the environments where standard furniture simply doesn't hold up.

Ryno Furniture is engineered for high-demand, high-risk, and challenging spaces where conventional seating and tables fail. Constructed from a single-piece polyethylene moulding, each piece is virtually indestructible — resistant to impact, moisture, and heavy institutional use. The one-piece construction eliminates joints, fasteners, and weak points that typically fail in demanding environments. Units can be heavily weighted internally to deter weaponization, making them a practical specification for secure facilities. A lifetime guarantee backs the construction, giving procurement teams a defensible long-term asset with minimal replacement cost.

Key features

  • Single-piece polyethylene construction with no joints or fasteners to fail.
  • Can be internally weighted to deter weaponization in secure environments.
  • Resistant to impact, moisture, and heavy daily use.
  • Lifetime guarantee on construction.
  • Designed with sustainability considerations, including use of recycled materials.
  • Suited for indoor and outdoor institutional applications.

Who it's for

Correctional facilities, psychiatric units, secure waiting areas, shelters, and First Nations band offices or community centres requiring durable, tamper-resistant furniture for high-traffic or supervised spaces. Municipal procurement teams and facility managers specifying furniture for challenging or outdoor environments will find Ryno a justifiable long-cycle investment.

Available through Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc., a verified OECM Supplier Partner. Delivery and installation across Ontario. Call 1-800-835-9565 for OECM procurement pricing and lead times.

Each of the 4 Directions (Noth, East, South & West) is typically represented by a distinctive color, such as white, red, yellow and black.

title: Innovation l-shape curved corner
body_html:
A corner desk that fits the way private offices actually get used — with room to spread out and a curved edge that keeps everything within reach.

The Innovation L-Shape Curved Corner brings a functional, space-conscious layout to private offices, manager workstations, and home-office setups that demand more than a single straight surface. The curved corner panel eliminates the awkward dead zone typical of hard-angled L-shapes, giving you a continuous, usable work surface across both runs. Available in three sizes to suit tighter executive offices or larger open-plan configurations, and offered in multiple colour options so it integrates cleanly with existing furniture without a full refresh. Ships ready to assemble, keeping delivery straightforward and installation flexible.

Key features

  • L-shape configuration with curved corner panel for continuous, comfortable reach across both surfaces.
  • Available in 3 sizes to fit a range of private office and workstation footprints.
  • Multiple colour options to coordinate with existing office furniture and finishes.
  • Ready-to-assemble construction for flexible, cost-effective installation.
  • Designed for daily commercial use in private offices, manager stations, and administrative workspaces.

Who it's for

Office administrators, managers, and procurement teams outfitting private offices or multi-person administrative areas where surface area and layout efficiency matter. Suited to municipalities, non-profits, professional services firms, and any organization standardizing on a practical, mid-range desk solution.

Brant Business Interiors delivers and installs across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times, available sizes and colour options, and free design layouts.

title: Innovations double pedestal desk bf/bf 5 sizes, 8 colours — 5 sizes
body_html:
A double-pedestal desk built for real office work, with the sizing and finish options to fit almost any private or shared workspace.

The INNOVATIONS Double Pedestal Desk (bf/bf) is a commercial-grade laminate desk available in five sizes and eight finishes, giving procurement teams the flexibility to equip multiple offices in a consistent look without special-order lead times. Tops and gables are 1" thick thermally fused melamine on a 45 lb industrial particleboard core — construction that holds up to daily use in busy offices. Modesty panels are available in 3/4" or 1" thickness. Leveling glides are included for uneven floors. The bf/bf configuration provides two box/file pedestals, giving users drawer storage and lateral hanging file capacity at both sides of the work surface.

Key features

  • Available in 5 sizes to fit a range of private and open-plan office layouts.
  • 8 finish options for coordinated multi-office procurement.
  • 1" thick thermally fused melamine tops and gables on a 45 lb industrial particleboard core.
  • Modesty panels available in 3/4" or 1" thickness.
  • Double bf/bf pedestal configuration with box and file drawer storage on both sides.
  • Leveling glides included for stable placement on uneven surfaces.
  • In-stock availability supports fast-turnaround office fit-outs.

Who it's for

Office administrators and facilities managers at SMBs, municipal offices, non-profits, and healthcare organizations who need dependable, spec-consistent workstations across multiple offices without long lead times. Well-suited to multi-desk procurement where finish coordination matters.

Brant Business Interiors carries the INNOVATIONS series in stock from 5 Ontario locations, with delivery and installation available across Ontario. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times, volume pricing, and free design layouts.

title: L-shape desk & hutch
body_html:
A proper L-shape workstation built for the way a working office actually runs.

This L-Shape Desk & Hutch gives private offices and manager workstations the surface area they need without sacrificing storage. The hutch adds overhead shelving and enclosed cabinet space above the desk return, keeping reference materials, binders, and equipment off the main work surface. Box and file drawers are built in, so day-to-day filing stays within arm's reach. Available in many colours, the finish can be matched to an existing suite or specified as part of a new installation. Chair and keyboard tray are not included and can be sourced separately to suit individual ergonomic requirements.

Key features

  • L-shape configuration provides two distinct work zones within a single footprint.
  • Integrated hutch offers overhead shelving and enclosed storage above the return.
  • Box and file drawer pedestals included for day-to-day document storage.
  • Available in many colours to coordinate with existing office furniture.
  • Commercial-grade construction suited to full-time, multi-year use.
  • Chair and keyboard tray not included — select separately to meet ergonomic needs.

Who it's for

Office managers, department heads, and administrative staff in private or semi-private offices who need organized, high-capacity desk space. Well suited to small business offices, municipal administration, family health teams, and any workplace where a single workstation carries a heavy daily workload.

Brant Business Interiors serves buyers across Ontario from 5 locations, with delivery and installation available province-wide. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times, colour samples, and free design layouts.

title: L-shape desk (8 sizes & 9 colour options) — 8 sizes
body_html:
A configurable L-shape desk built for the way private offices actually run — eight sizes, nine finishes, and the flexibility to fit the room you have.

The Innovations Series delivers high-quality construction with thoughtful details throughout: soft-close hinges, durable laminate surfaces, and a deep 30" work surface that gives you real room to spread out. With over 100 components available across the series, this L-shape can be configured to match your space, your storage needs, and your finish palette. Nine colour options mean it integrates cleanly into an existing interior without a full refresh. The return is reversible, so it adapts to left- or right-hand layouts without special ordering.

Key features

  • Available in 8 sizes to suit a range of private office footprints.
  • Nine laminate finish options across the Innovations Series.
  • 30" desk depth provides a full working surface for monitors, documents, and peripherals.
  • Reversible return for left- or right-hand configuration.
  • Soft-close hinges standard on storage components.
  • Part of the Innovations Series — over 100 components available for coordinated office builds.
  • In-stock availability on select configurations for faster fulfilment.

Who it's for

Office managers and procurement teams outfitting private offices, executive suites, or multi-station workspaces where finish consistency and configurability matter. Well-suited to professional services firms, health teams, and municipal offices specifying multiple workstations under a single order.

title: L-shape height adjustable desk set
body_html:
A complete height-adjustable workstation built for the private office that needs both flexibility and real storage.

This L-Shape Height Adjustable Desk Set pairs a motorized sit-stand table with a credenza, hutch, and monitor arm — giving you a fully configured workspace right out of the box. The heavy-duty 3-stage steel frame handles the demands of a full workday, while the synchronized motor system raises and lowers both legs in unison across an extended height range of 22" to 48" (excluding the 1" top surface). Four programmable memory positions mean each user can save their preferred heights and switch between them without guesswork. The contemporary offset foot design keeps clearance open below the desk for a keyboard tray or accessories. Quick assembly is built into the design: the fold-out leg frame gets the table standing fast, so your team spends less time setting up and more time working.

Key features

  • Includes height-adjustable table, credenza, hutch, and monitor arm — complete L-shape configuration.
  • Extended height range: 22" to 48" (excludes 1" top).
  • Heavy-duty 3-stage steel frame for long-term commercial durability.
  • Synchronized motor drives each leg simultaneously for level, stable height transitions.
  • 4 programmable memory positions for fast, repeatable height recall.
  • Contemporary offset foot design leaves clearance for keyboard trays and accessories.
  • Quick assembly via fold-out leg frame — minimal tools required.
  • In-stock item — available for prompt delivery across Ontario.

Who it's for

Office managers and procurement teams equipping private offices, executive workstations, or hybrid-use spaces where ergonomic flexibility, integrated storage, and a clean aesthetic all matter. Well-suited to professional services firms, municipal offices, and health-team settings where staff spend extended hours at their desks.

Brant Business Interiors delivers and installs across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times and free design layouts.

title: L-shape loop leg desk
body_html:
A proper L-shape workstation built for private offices and busy workstations that need room to get things done.

The Innovation Loop Leg Desk brings a clean, loop-leg base profile to an L-shape configuration — giving you a broad, stable work surface on both sides without the bulk of a pedestal base. The included Box/Box/File mobile drawer unit keeps everyday essentials within arm's reach and rolls clear when the space needs to flex. Loop legs keep the visual footprint light while maintaining the structural rigidity expected in a commercial-grade desk.

Key features

  • L-shape configuration provides a generous dual-surface layout suited to multi-monitor setups and document-heavy work.
  • Loop leg base design delivers a clean, open sightline compared to traditional panel-end construction.
  • Includes a Box/Box/File mobile drawer unit for built-in storage that moves when you need it to.
  • Mobile pedestal rolls under the work surface and locks in place for day-to-day use.
  • Commercial-grade construction suited to full-time, single-occupancy private office use.
  • Available in a range of surface and finish options — contact for current selections.

Who it's for

Office managers and administrators outfitting private offices or executive suites in professional services, municipalities, non-profits, or any organization that needs a clean, functional workstation with built-in storage.

Brant Business Interiors serves buyers across Ontario from 5 locations, with delivery and installation available. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times, finish options, and free design layouts.

The L-Shape Reception Desk — 72" x 72" x 41" — is part of the Heartwood Innovations Laminate Series, a line built around intelligent design and lasting durability. The 41" transaction height creates a natural standing-height counter for front-facing client interaction, while the L-shape footprint gives your reception staff the workspace they need to manage multiple tasks without feeling cramped. Laminate construction delivers the surface toughness required in high-traffic reception environments, resisting scratches, stains, and the wear of daily use.

Key features

  • Part of the Heartwood Innovations Laminate Series, combining intelligent design with lasting durability.
  • L-shape configuration measures 72" x 72", providing generous work surface on both sides.
  • 41" transaction height supports comfortable standing-height client interaction.
  • Laminate finish offers scratch and stain resistance suited to high-traffic reception areas.
  • Designed for professional front-of-office environments where appearance and function both matter.

Who it's for

Well-suited for office administrators outfitting reception areas in medical clinics, band offices, municipal facilities, non-profit organizations, and professional services firms. Facilities managers sourcing a durable, client-facing reception solution will find the Heartwood Innovations Laminate Series a practical, long-term investment.

title: Loop leg table
body_html:
A clean-lined leg table built for collaboration spaces, boardrooms, and multi-use offices that need real flexibility.

The LOOP Leg Table combines a 1" thick top with a matching PVC edge for a finished, commercial-grade look that holds up to daily use. Available in nine top colours and three leg colour options, it's straightforward to configure for your space without overcomplicating procurement. Multiple top sizes give facilities managers the range they need to outfit rooms of different scales — from small breakout areas to larger meeting rooms.

Key features

  • Top thickness: 1" for a solid, commercial-grade surface.
  • Edge: matching PVC edge banding for a clean, durable finish.
  • Top colour options: 9 colours to coordinate with existing interiors.
  • Leg colour options: 3 finishes for flexibility across different room palettes.
  • Multiple top sizes available to suit varied room configurations.
  • Loop leg base design provides stable support and a contemporary profile.

Who it's for

Office managers and facilities coordinators outfitting boardrooms, training rooms, or collaborative work areas where a clean, configurable table is needed at a practical price point. Well-suited to private-sector offices, professional services firms, and administrative environments across Ontario.

Brant Business Interiors serves commercial and institutional buyers from 5 Ontario locations, with delivery and installation available across the province. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times, size options, and free design layouts.

title: Lounge seating (3 sizes available) — 3 sizes
body_html:
Contemporary lounge seating that works as hard as the reception area it anchors.

The Citi Lounge collection brings a clean, geometric profile to waiting rooms, lobbies, and collaborative spaces that need seating comfortable enough for extended use and durable enough to handle daily traffic. Upholstered in high-performance faux leather, each piece resists wear and cleans easily — a practical choice wherever hygiene and presentation both matter. Sleek barrel-shaped chrome-colour legs keep the silhouette modern without demanding a redesign of the surrounding space. Available in three sizes to suit rooms of different scales, the collection lets you configure a seating arrangement that fits your footprint without compromise.

Key features

  • High-performance faux leather upholstery — easy to clean, resistant to daily wear.
  • Sinuous spring seat construction for firm, lasting comfort.
  • Barrel-shaped chrome-colour legs with a contemporary finish.
  • Linear, geometric profile suits modern and transitional interiors.
  • Available in three sizes to suit a range of room configurations.
  • Commercial-grade build appropriate for high-traffic waiting areas and lobbies.

Who it's for

Office managers, facilities coordinators, and administrative leads sourcing reception or lounge seating for professional offices, health clinics, non-profit reception areas, and municipal waiting rooms. The easy-care upholstery makes it a strong fit for any shared space where appearance and maintenance both factor into the buying decision.

Brant Business Interiors serves clients across Ontario from 5 locations, with delivery and installation available province-wide. Call 1-800-835-9565 to confirm available sizes, upholstery colours, and current lead times.

title: Lounge seating 3 sizes suburb — 3 sizes
body_html:
A sofa series that holds its shape through years of heavy lobby and lounge use — built right here in Canada.

The Suburb seating series brings a clean, tailored profile to reception areas, collaborative lounges, and staff common rooms without sacrificing comfort. Thick, plush cushions are both reversible and removable, making upkeep straightforward in high-traffic environments. Tapered black wood legs and arms with a radius end give the line a refined, consistent look across all three sizes. Available in Grade 1 seating textiles or Luxhide in a range of colours, the Suburb can be specified to match virtually any interior palette. All models are freestanding and GREENGUARD-compliant, meeting the emissions guidelines set by the GREENGUARD Environmental Institute — a meaningful checkpoint for schools, health facilities, and public-sector offices evaluating indoor air quality.

Key features

  • Canadian-made sofa series available in three seat sizes.
  • All models are freestanding — no wall-mounting or anchoring required.
  • Thick, plush cushions are fully reversible and removable for easy maintenance.
  • Standard tapered black wood legs for a consistent, contemporary finish.
  • Arms taper forward and feature a radius end for a polished silhouette.
  • Compliant with GREENGUARD Environmental Institute emissions guidelines.
  • Upholstery options: Grade 1 seating textiles or Luxhide in various colours.

Who it's for

Well-suited for office managers and procurement teams furnishing reception areas, waiting rooms, staff lounges, or collaborative zones in corporate, institutional, and public-sector settings where appearance and durability both matter.

The Suburb series is available through Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc., a verified OECM Supplier Partner. Delivery and installation across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 for OECM procurement pricing, fabric samples, and current lead times.

title: Makerspace tables
body_html:
Avenue A-Frame Table

Features

  • 1-3/4" Thick Solid Maple Worksurface
  • 11-gauge steel “L” channel welded to the legs and bolted to dual cross-table supports for additional strength
  • 2-1/2" x 2-1/2" thick wall square steel tubes with a fully welded 2" x 2" cross brace
  • Choose from 4" industrial casters, 4" designer casters, or glides
  • Diversified Woodcrafts Inc. is SEFA compliant and MAS Certified Green
  • Limited Lifetime Warranty
  • Minimal assembly required
  • Overall Dimensions: 48W x 30D
  • Powdercoat Frame Finish
  • The top is attached with screws in two directions ensuring stability

Avenue A-Frame Table

Our A-Frame table adds function and beauty to any space you desire—by customizing a table that is uniquely yours. The powder coated legs are made of 2-1/2" x 2-1/2" thick wall square steel tubes, with a fully welded 2" x 2" cross brace. The top is supported with an 11-gauge steel “L” channel welded to the legs and bolted to dual cross-table supports for additional strength. Bolts are color matched to the color of the frame. The top is attached with screws in two directions ensuring the tables stability. The table moves effortlessly on locking, swivel casters or designer casters. Glide option also available. The frame is available in eight powder coat colors. Top Surface: 1-3/4" solid oak. 

Sizes Available

  • 48" Wide (Priced)
  • 60" Wide
  • 72" Wide
  • 84" Wide
  • 96" Wide


Material

Metal

title: Medicine wheel table indigenous
body_html:
A purpose-built gathering table designed for collaborative spaces that need durability and a distinct identity.

The Medicine Wheel Table is an exclusive design built around the four-direction circular motif, with each quadrant rendered in a distinctive colour. Construction starts with 1" thick, 45 lb high-density particleboard — a commercial-grade core that holds up under daily institutional use. High-pressure, scratch-resistant laminate protects the surface, while a chewing-gum-resistant table backing keeps the underside clean in high-traffic environments. A 3 mm vinyl bonded edgeband and fully rounded corners complete a finish that is safe, durable, and low-maintenance. Adjustable-height legs give facility managers flexibility across different room configurations and user needs.

Key features

  • 1" thick, 45 lb high-density particleboard core for commercial-grade rigidity.
  • High-pressure scratch-resistant laminate surface for long-term durability.
  • Chewing-gum-resistant table backing for easy maintenance in busy spaces.
  • 3 mm vinyl bonded edgeband on all exposed edges.
  • Rounded corners for user safety in shared and public-facing environments.
  • Adjustable-height legs to accommodate varied room and user requirements.
  • Four-direction circular design rendered in four distinctive colours.

Who it's for

Well suited to First Nations band offices, Indigenous health and wellness centres, community meeting rooms, and institutional spaces — such as school boards and municipalities — that require a functional gathering table with a recognizable visual identity. Available through Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc., a verified OECM Supplier Partner.

Brant Business Interiors delivers and installs across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 for OECM procurement pricing and current lead times.

title: Mobile pedestal drawer box/file
body_html:
A lockable mobile pedestal that keeps files and supplies exactly where the work happens.

This metal box/file mobile pedestal is built for active workstations that need organized, accessible storage without sacrificing floor space. The box-over-file drawer configuration handles everyday supplies up top and hanging files below, with conversion bars included so you can switch between front-to-back and side-to-side filing. Ball bearing suspension slides make both drawers smooth to open even when loaded. A keylock with removable core keeps contents secure, and hooded casters with a counterweight let you move the unit safely without tipping. An optional cushion (ordered separately) converts the top into a guest perch or informal seat — useful in tighter offices where every surface counts.

Key features

  • Metal construction tested to meet applicable ANSI/BIFMA standards.
  • Keylock with removable core included for secure, shared-office environments.
  • Ball bearing suspension slides on all drawers for smooth, reliable operation.
  • File drawer supports front-to-back filing; conversion bars included for side-to-side filing.
  • Drawer fronts feature recessed angled full-width pull for easy grip.
  • Hooded casters and counterweight included for stable mobility.
  • Optional cushion available, ordered separately, for occasional seating use.
  • 19" deep model dimensions: 15"W x 18.5"D x 23.13"H.

Who it's for

Office managers and administrative staff at businesses, non-profits, health teams, and municipal offices who need a mobile filing solution that pairs with an existing workstation or open-plan desk. Also well suited to shared-office layouts where underdesk storage needs to move between users or workpoints.

Brant Business Interiors serves commercial and institutional buyers from 5 Ontario locations, with delivery and installation available across the province. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times and free design layouts.

title: Multi-storage cabinet — 93365MSL
body_html:
Three high storage and lateral filing in one cabinet — built for offices that need to keep everything in reach and in order.

The 9300 Series Multi-Storage Cabinet (model 93365MSL) combines upper shelving with a built-in lateral file section, giving your team a single unit that handles both general storage and active filing without doubling up on floor space. The upper section includes two fixed shelves and one adjustable shelf, while the lower lateral file section provides one "B" opening and one "L" opening — both fitted with side-to-side hanging file bars. Doors open to at least 170°, so access is straightforward even in tighter workrooms or corridor alcoves. Two separate locking systems let you secure the storage and file sections independently, which matters when sensitive records share a cabinet with general supplies.

Key features

  • Model 93365MSL — 36" wide, three-high configuration.
  • Upper section: two fixed shelves and one adjustable shelf.
  • Lower lateral file: one "B" opening and one "L" opening.
  • Side-to-side hanging file bars included in lateral file drawers.
  • Doors open to a minimum 170° for full, unobstructed access.
  • Two separate locking systems — storage and file sections secured independently.
  • Four adjustable leveling glides for stable placement on uneven floors.

Who it's for

Office administrators at municipalities, school boards, health teams, and non-profits who need consolidated filing and supply storage in a single commercial-grade cabinet. Also well-suited for private offices and workrooms in professional services or manufacturing environments where floor space is at a premium.

Brant Business Interiors stocks and delivers commercial storage across Ontario from 5 locations, with installation available. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times and free design layouts.

title: Napa boardroom conference table
body_html:
A boardroom table that earns its place at the head of every meeting.

The Napa Boardroom Conference Table is built around an oval form that works with the room rather than against it — curved ends seat people comfortably on all sides without the awkward corners of a rectangular table. The laminate top is finished with durable, comfortable edging and clean lines that hold up to daily use. Laminate panel bases and a centre support beam deliver the structural stability you need in a high-traffic meeting environment, while keeping the silhouette balanced and uncluttered. Two sizes let you right-size the table to your room without compromise.

Key features

  • Oval shape accommodates multiple room sizes and configurations.
  • Curved ends seat participants comfortably around the full perimeter of the table.
  • Laminate table top with durable, comfortable edge profile and clean lines.
  • Laminate panel bases with centre support beam for structural stability.
  • Model NAP35: 35″W × 71″L × 29″H — seats 6 comfortably.
  • Model NAP36: 44″W × 95″L × 29″H — seats 8 comfortably.

Who it's for

Well suited to private-sector boardrooms, municipal meeting rooms, non-profit offices, and health team facilities that need a polished, functional conference table without the complexity of a custom order. The two available sizes cover most mid-sized meeting spaces without modification.

title: Newland box/file mobile pedestal — NLMP23BF
body_html:
A hardworking mobile pedestal that keeps your files organized and rolls wherever the work takes you.

The Newland Box/File Mobile Pedestal (NLMP23BF) is built for offices that need practical, accessible storage without sacrificing floor space. The box drawer handles everyday supplies while the file drawer manages letter- and legal-size documents — both secured by a front-locking cylinder so your files stay where they belong. Thermally fused laminate surfaces resist scratches and daily wear, and the 2mm PVC matching edge treatment gives the unit a finished, furniture-grade look that holds up over time. Five casters — including two front locking casters — keep it stable when you need it parked and mobile when you need it moved.

Key features

  • Model NLMP23BF — box drawer over file drawer configuration.
  • Thermally fused laminate construction for durability and scratch resistance.
  • 2mm PVC matching edge on drawer fronts for a clean, furniture-grade finish.
  • Front-locking cylinder secures both the box drawer and file drawer; lock and keys included.
  • Pencil tray included in the box drawer for small-item organization.
  • Supported by five casters with two front locking casters for stable positioning.

Who it's for

Office administrators, executive assistants, and team leads who need mobile under-desk storage at a workstation or private office. Well suited to municipal offices, health teams, and commercial workplaces running assigned seating where daily-access filing is a priority.

Brant Business Interiors serves commercial and institutional buyers from 5 Ontario locations, with delivery and installation available across the province. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times and free design layouts.

title: ObusForme Comfort high back chair — 1240-3
body_html:
The chair that keeps your back where it should be, all day long.

ObusForme's Comfort High Back Chair (model 1240-3) is built around the ergonomic science the brand is known for — particularly its articulating armcaps and Schukra™ lumbar system, which deliver genuine spinal support rather than a generic padding solution. The high back design supports the full length of the spine, making it a dependable choice for staff who spend the bulk of their day seated at a workstation. The five-legged injection-moulded reinforced nylon base provides stable, commercial-grade footing, and an optional polished aluminum base is available for environments where finish matters.

Key features

  • Model 1240-3 high back chair with full spinal support profile.
  • Articulating armcaps that angle inward up to 30 degrees for natural forearm positioning.
  • Schukra™ adjustable lumbar support standard on selected configurations.
  • Five-legged injection-moulded reinforced nylon black base as standard.
  • Optional polished aluminum base available at upcharge.
  • Heavy-duty multi-tilter models available, rated for users up to 350 lbs.

Who it's for

Office administrators, case managers, and desk-based staff in business offices, non-profit organizations, health teams, and municipal or band-office environments where daily ergonomic comfort directly affects productivity and staff retention. The 350 lb. heavy-duty rating makes select configurations suitable for a broader range of users without requiring a separate bariatric procurement line.

Brant Business Interiors carries ObusForme seating across 5 Ontario locations, with delivery and installation available province-wide. Call 1-800-835-9565 to confirm ergonomic options, base finishes, and current lead times for model 1240-3.

title: Offices to Go ® newland™ l-shaped suite — NLP420
body_html:
A complete private-office suite built for a full day of focused work.

The Offices to Go® Newland™ L-Shaped Suite NLP420 delivers a ready-to-work command centre in a single coordinated package. The 72" × 72" footprint gives you a generous primary worksurface plus a return, while the included box/box/file pedestal keeps daily documents close at hand with locking storage for security. A modesty panel is included for the table desk, and the hutch — with 20" of clearance between the worksurface and the underside of the shelf — provides practical overhead storage without compromising wire access. Three wire management grommets keep cabling organized and out of sight. The suite is reversible left or right, so it adapts to the orientation of the room rather than the other way around.

Key features

  • Complete suite includes table desk, return, box/box/file pedestal, and modesty panel.
  • Hutch with doors included; 20" clearance below shelf for wire management.
  • Three wire management grommets integrated into the worksurface.
  • Locking pedestal storage for secure document and supply access.
  • 72" × 72" L-shaped footprint; reversible left or right configuration.
  • Ship weight 479 lbs (217.27 kg); volume 28.75 ft³ (0.81 m³).
  • Model code: NLP420.

Who it's for

Office administrators, managers, and department heads at municipalities, non-profits, family health teams, or private-sector firms who need a fully specified private-office workstation without sourcing components separately. A strong fit for any organization outfitting a dedicated office on a defined budget.

Brant Business Interiors carries the Newland™ suite line and offers delivery and installation across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times and free design layouts.

body_html:
A compact mesh-back tilter built for average to petite frames — without sacrificing support.

The OTG13026 Safari is a straightforward task chair designed for offices where comfort and manageability matter more than bells and whistles. The tilter mechanism with upright lock and tension control lets users dial in a comfortable recline or hold the chair firm — useful in focused work settings where posture consistency counts. Fixed loop arms keep the profile clean and the price accessible. The Safari fits well where seating needs to be practical, durable, and easy to specify across multiple positions.

Key features

  • Model: OTG13026 Safari Medium Mesh Back Tilter.

Who it's for

title: Outdoor park benches
body_html:
A bench built to stay outside and take whatever the season brings.

These outdoor park benches are constructed entirely from recycled plastic — structure and slats — making them resistant to moisture, UV exposure, and the freeze-thaw cycles that split and rot wood over time. No painting, staining, or sealing required. Available in five colours, they suit a wide range of exterior environments without looking like an afterthought. Two size options cover most placement needs, from a compact 60" unit to a full 72" park-style bench.

Key features

  • Recycled plastic construction — frame and slats — for long-term outdoor durability.
  • No maintenance required: will not rot, splinter, or require repainting.
  • Available in 5 colours to match exterior environments or organizational branding.
  • 72" unit dimensions: 72" W × 23-3/16" D × 29-13/16" H.
  • 60" unit dimensions: 60" × 17" × 17".
  • Suited for building entrances, rest areas, parks, golf courses, and outdoor common areas.

Who it's for

Facilities managers and procurement officers sourcing exterior seating for office campuses, municipal parks, school grounds, healthcare sites, or recreational areas. A practical choice wherever low-maintenance, weather-resistant outdoor seating is a priority.

title: Outdoor steel bench
body_html:
A commercial-grade outdoor bench built to stay put through Ontario seasons.

This outdoor steel bench combines durable metal construction with an ergonomic profile — including lumbar support — to give occupants a genuinely comfortable seat in exterior settings. A polyester powder-coat finish resists weathering and UV exposure, while pre-drilled anchoring holes let facilities teams secure the bench permanently to concrete or pavement (anchors not included). At 48" W × 25" D × 34" H, it suits entranceways, courtyards, transit stops, and campus grounds. The bench carries 69% post-consumer recycled content and is free of VOCs, supporting organizational sustainability targets without sacrificing structural integrity.

Key features

  • All-steel construction with durable polyester powder-coat finish for weather and corrosion resistance.
  • Ergonomic seat profile with lumbar support for extended outdoor use.
  • Pre-drilled holes for permanent anchoring; anchors not included.
  • 48" W × 25" D × 34" H — suited to entranceways, courtyards, and campus exteriors.
  • Available in Green, Blue, Red, Black, and Yellow to match site or brand colour standards.
  • 69% post-consumer recycled content supports sustainability procurement criteria.
  • VOC-free construction — no off-gassing concerns in sheltered or semi-enclosed outdoor areas.

title: Pedestal - box/box/file (with or without wheels)
body_html:
Under-desk storage that works as hard as the people using it.

The Box/Box/File Pedestal is a commercial-grade mobile or fixed storage unit designed to sit beneath a worksurface in private offices, open-plan workstations, and administrative settings. Three drawers — two box drawers for everyday supplies and one file drawer — keep what you need within arm's reach without cluttering the desk above. Optional wheels let the unit roll with you; levelling glides keep it planted when you don't need it to move. The full-extension ball-bearing suspension means every drawer opens smoothly and fully, even under daily heavy use. A standard keylock with removable core keeps sensitive documents secure, and the file drawer ships with conversion bars for lateral side-to-side filing. Meets ANSI/BIFMA standards for commercial furniture — a requirement many institutional procurement teams carry forward into specification sheets.

Key features

  • Available with or without wheels for fixed or mobile configurations.
  • Three-drawer layout: two box drawers plus one file drawer.
  • File drawer includes conversion bars for side-to-side filing.
  • Full-extension ball-bearing suspension on all drawers for smooth, reliable operation.
  • Standard keylock included with removable core for document security.
  • Recessed angled full-pull drawer fronts for ergonomic, hardware-forward access.
  • Levelling glides included for stable placement on uneven floors.
  • Includes one pencil tray; meets or exceeds ANSI/BIFMA standards.

Who it's for

Office administrators, municipal staff, school board employees, and private-sector office managers who need reliable, lockable under-desk storage in both open-plan and private-office environments.

Brant Business Interiors carries and installs office storage solutions across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times and free design layouts.
