title: Premium height adjustable l-shape table
body_html:
An L-shape workstation that grows with your team — height-adjustable from 22" to 48" and ready to fit your existing top or a new Innovations surface.

This height-adjustable L-shape table base is built around a heavy-duty 3-stage steel frame with a synchronized motor driving each leg in tandem, so the surface stays level at every position. The extended height range — 22" to 48" (excluding the 1" top) — accommodates seated and standing work without compromise. Four programmable memory positions let users dial in their preferred heights and return to them instantly. The fold-out leg frame means quick assembly out of the box, and the contemporary offset foot leaves clearance for a keyboard tray or monitor arm without crowding the footwell. Tops are sold separately; this base is designed to work with the Innovations tops line or to retrofit onto your existing worksurface, protecting past investments in furniture already in service.

Key features

  • Extended height range: 22" to 48" (excludes 1" top).
  • Heavy-duty 3-stage steel frame for long-term structural stability.
  • Synchronized actuator motor drives each leg simultaneously.
  • 4 programmable memory positions for instant height recall.
  • Fold-out leg frame for quick, low-tool assembly.
  • Contemporary offset foot accommodates keyboard trays and accessories.
  • Compatible with Innovations tops (sold separately) or retrofit onto existing worksurface.
  • In-stock — available for prompt delivery.

Who it's for

Office managers and procurement professionals outfitting private offices, shared workstations, or sit-stand pilot programs in business, healthcare, or municipal environments. title: Premium series lateral file cabinet (2,3,4 & 5 drawer) — 5 drawer
body_html:
Lateral filing that handles the load without taking over the room.

The Premium Series 9300 Lateral File Cabinet brings professional-grade filing capacity to private offices, records rooms, and administrative workstations across a range of configurations. Available in 2, 3, 4, and 5 drawer models — and in 30", 36", and 42" widths — it adapts to the depth of your filing needs without compromising floor space. Fixed front lateral drawers accommodate letter, legal, and A4 metric file sizes with side-to-side hanging file bars included, so your team can get files organized from day one. The receding "B" door openings also accommodate three-ring binders, giving you a single cabinet that handles both filing and reference storage in one footprint.

Key features

  • Available in 2, 3, 4, and 5 drawer configurations to match filing volume.
  • Width options: 30", 36", and 42" — centre pull or full pull (P) configurations available.
  • Fixed front lateral file drawers ("B" & "L") accept letter, legal, and A4 metric file sizes.
  • Side-to-side hanging file bars included in all drawer configurations.
  • Receding "B" door openings accommodate three-ring binders.
  • Central core removable cam lock for consolidated security across multiple drawers.
  • Interlock system prevents tipping by allowing only one drawer to open at a time.

Who it's for

Office administrators, records managers, and operations staff in municipal offices, school boards, health teams, and professional services firms who need a reliable, high-capacity lateral file at a practical price point. Well suited to both private offices and shared administrative areas where filing volume and safety both matter.

Brant Business Interiors serves buyers across Ontario from 5 locations, with delivery and installation available province-wide. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times, configuration options, and free design layouts.

title: Raven high back heavy duty synchro-tilter chair — OTG10703B
body_html:
Built for the long shift — and the person who needs a chair that can keep up.

The Raven High Back Heavy Duty Synchro-Tilter Chair (OTG10703B) is engineered for individuals who are taller or carry more weight, delivering reliable ergonomic support across continuous, demanding use. Whether deployed at a dispatch desk, a 24-hour operations centre, or a busy administrative workstation, the Raven 400 is built to perform where standard task chairs fall short. The high-back design provides full lumbar and upper-back contact, while the synchro-tilt mechanism lets users fine-tune recline to match how they actually sit throughout the day.

Key features

  • Synchro-tilter mechanism with multi-position tilt lock for controlled recline.
  • Ratchet back height adjustment to fit a range of body types and preferences.
  • Side-activated sliding seat depth adjustment for proper thigh support.
  • Heavy-duty construction rated for continuous 24-hour use in demanding environments.
  • High-back design supports lumbar and upper back through extended seated periods.
  • Model code: OTG10703B.

Who it's for

Ideal for municipalities, logistics operations, hospitals, band offices, and any workplace running extended or 24-hour shifts where a standard chair won't hold up. Also well-suited for larger-framed individuals in private-sector offices, manufacturing environments, and professional services firms looking for a chair with meaningful capacity and adjustability.

Brant Business Interiors delivers and installs across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 to confirm ergonomic options and finishes for your space.

title: Roma 1900 nesting chair
body_html:
A nesting chair built for the rooms that need to reconfigure fast — and look good doing it.

The Roma 1900 Nesting Chair is designed for multi-use spaces where seating needs to move, stack, and show up in volume. Whether it's a boardroom, training room, or shared meeting area, Roma handles frequent repositioning without sacrificing comfort or finish. The flexible Flex Response Back Support — built from polypropylene with an upholstered posture back — provides genuine spinal alignment and lateral support when occupants are reaching or shifting during long sessions. Four back styles, two arm options, and a choice of mesh, fabric, vinyl, or leather seat upholstery mean Roma can be specified to suit the room rather than defaulting to a single configuration.

Key features

  • Flex Response Back Support with flexible polypropylene construction for spinal alignment and seated mobility.
  • Four back styles available, with two arm options to suit open-plan or formal settings.
  • Seat upholstery available in fabric, vinyl, or leather; mesh back available in multiple colours.
  • Arms and arm caps constructed of durable fibreglass-reinforced material for long-term commercial use.
  • Nesting design for efficient storage and fast room reconfiguration.
  • Available with matching colour fabric options across back and seat for coordinated specification.

Who it's for

title: Safco 2130SL desk mount for monitor, keyboard
body_html:
Part of the Safco Active Collection, this Desktop Sit/Stand Workstation promotes body movement that stimulates your mind and body. The ergonomic, adjustable-height workstation converter retrofits to most desks and worksurfaces up to 3" thick. Design lets you raise monitor and keyboard for use as a standing workstation to promote better posture, provide optimal viewing comfort and help alleviate eyestrain while saving valuable worksurface area. Monitor and keyboard stand height are individually adjustable. Keyboard stand extends and retracts manually to adjust distance between screen and keyboard. The 26" wide x 10-3/4" platform adjusts 2-1/4" in depth and 12-1/4" in height. Monitor provides tilt adjustment and locks into place. Lift and tilt mechanisms are manual with no knobs or levers needed to make adjustments. Cables are concealed within the adjustable arm for a neat, cord-free and clutter-free desktop. Workstation converter holds up to 11 lb. and is made of steel and aluminum.+

title: Screenflex 5 panel mobile light-duty portable room divider, 6'5"h x 9'5"w, fabric color: stone — 5"
body_html:
Screenflex Portable Room Dividers are the world's highest quality portable walls and can help you make much better use of your facility, time and budget. Simply roll them into position and set up the tackable sound absorbing panels in seconds. The temporary walls can be used as classroom partitions, to create training rooms, for art display, or simply to divide any open area in any room. Churches and other housed of worship use the portable partitions for Sunday School along with other programs. Managers of corporations, government buildings and facilities in the hospitality industry, all use Screenflex Folding Partition Walls to help manage their valuable floor space in an economical attractive fashion. Quality built to last here in the USA. Light Assembly Required On Casters.

Features:

  • Sound Absorbing Panels: Each 3/4-inch-thick panel is made of a closed-cell honeycomb core for maximum sound absorption. Followed by two layers of environmentally friendly insulation to absorb ambient noise. The panel is then covered in 76% recycled fabric to reduce noise by up to 55%. A steel frame surrounds the entire panel for added strength.
  • Tackable Fabric Panels: Like a bulletin board, you can pin, staple, or tack items directly onto the panels. Screenflex Room Dividers are constructed using 3/4-inch-thick panels made out of a closed-cell honeycomb core covered with two layers of fiberglass insulation overlayed with stitch-bonded polyester fabric to provide you with years of dependable use.
  • Full-Length Hinges: Metal Full-Length Hinges connect acoustical panels, top to bottom, to provide strength and stability.
  • Low Profile End Frame: This low lying end support provides all the stability you need when using your divider for light use applications.
  • Manually Adjustable Casters: Adjusting the height of your divider is as easy as a twist of your wrist. Manually adjusting the casters allows you to achieve just the right height for your divider.

eights & Dimensions

Width 113 in Height 77 in Weight 70 lbs Thickness 3/4 in

title: Sidero
body_html:
GC Sidero is a collection of contemporary multi-purpose stacking chairs with a sculpted look, featuring wide, curved arms, and a round tubular wallsaver steel frame.

  • Compound curved back provides comfort and support in multiple seated positions.
  • Rugged steel frame made from round welded steel tubing with a 7/8” dia.
  • Wallsaver frame protects the wall from damage.
  • Comfortable 2” high density and highly resilient Ultracell foam with waterfall seat, ensures maximum comfort.
  • Three seat widths: 19.5” (standard size), 24” (Mid Size) and 30” (Bariatric) seat width.
  • Two different back constructions are offered: Concealed Back attachment with two piece back covering the back support brackets when fastened in place and Single Piece Back with a pullover style upholstery cover and support bracket fastened on the outer back.
  • Low and high back models are available: Low back version is available on all three seat widths at 15.5" high, High back version on 19" and 24" seat widths at 21" high, and High back version on bariatric 30" seat width at 21" high.
  • Arms are 2 1/8” wide and full length, offering additional support and helps to stabilize users as they sit or exit the chair. The gently curved arms are made from incredibly strong fibreglass reinforced Nylon. Available in Black (BLK).

 

Dimensions: W36.5 x D24 x H38.5 IN.

Other colours available.

title: Sidero guest chair 28 colour options — 28 colour
body_html:
A guest chair that works as hard in a boardroom as it does in a waiting room — without looking like it's trying too hard.

The Sidero™ is a multi-purpose side chair built around a round tubular steel frame with wide, full-length curved arms and a sculptured seat profile. The four-legged base is designed to be wall safe: the rear legs contact the baseboard first, keeping clearance between the chair back and the wall to protect both the chair and the painted surface behind it. With 28 colour options, specifying across departments or matching an existing interior palette is straightforward. This is commercial-grade seating built for continuous, multi-user environments — reception areas, meeting rooms, training spaces, and anywhere guest seating takes daily wear.

Key features

  • Multi-purpose side chair with sculptured seat and backrest profile.
  • Wide, full-length curved arms provide support and a finished look.
  • Round tubular steel frame — commercial-grade construction.
  • Four-legged base is wall safe: rear legs protect both the chair and wall surface.
  • Available in 28 colour options to suit varied interior specifications.
  • Suited for reception, meeting, training, and multi-user guest seating applications.

Who it's for

Office administrators, facilities managers, and procurement teams specifying guest, reception, or multi-use seating for offices, health teams, municipal buildings, or institutional environments where durability and appearance both matter.

Brant Business Interiors delivers and installs across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 to confirm colour options, quantities, and current lead times.

title: Sirena lounge chair
body_html:
A club-style lounge chair built for reception areas and private offices that see real use.

The Sirena Lounge Chair brings a modern take on the classic bucket seat — curved back, fixed cushions, and a webbed suspension system working together to deliver consistent support across a full workday. Available as a single seater, two-seater, or three-seater, the Sirena scales naturally from a compact private office waiting area to a full reception suite. Choose from fabric or leather upholstery, with an optional two-toned finish for spaces that call for a more tailored look. The matte black foot grounds the silhouette while adding just enough lift to keep the piece looking current without chasing trends.

Key features

  • Bucket seat with curved back for continuous comfort and lateral support.
  • Fixed cushions and webbed suspension provide durability under daily use.
  • Single seater dimensions: W30.5 × D29.5 × H28.5 in.
  • Two-seater dimensions: W62 × D29.5 × H28.5 in.
  • Available in fabric or leather upholstery.
  • Optional two-toned upholstery for a customized finish.
  • Black foot base adds stability and a slightly elevated stance.

Who it's for

Office managers and procurement professionals furnishing reception areas, client-facing waiting rooms, or executive lounge spaces in commercial and institutional settings. The multi-seat configuration options make it practical for specifying a coordinated seating arrangement in a single order.

Brant Business Interiors carries and installs the Sirena Lounge Chair across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 to confirm upholstery options, current lead times, and free design layouts.

title: Six 31 | medium back multi-tilter — GLBOTG11631B
body_html:
A medium-back task chair built for full workdays in demanding office environments.

The Six 31 Multi-Tilter (model GLBOTG11631B) is a commercial-grade operator chair designed for the people who sit at a desk and get things done. The multi-tilt mechanism lets the seat and back move together or independently, giving each user genuine postural control without a lengthy adjustment learning curve. The medium back profile supports the lumbar and mid-back through long working hours, while the upholstered construction keeps the chair practical and easy to maintain in shared or high-use settings.

Key features

  • Model GLBOTG11631B — Six 31 Medium Back Multi-Tilter task chair.
  • Multi-tilt mechanism allows coordinated seat and back movement for active sitting support.
  • Medium back design provides lumbar and mid-back coverage through extended use.
  • Commercial-grade construction suited to full-day, five-day-a-week use.
  • Upholstered seat and back for comfort in shared or assigned workstations.
  • Pneumatic seat-height adjustment for quick, tool-free customization.

Who it's for

Office administrators, coordinators, and operational staff who spend the majority of their workday at a desk — including team environments in municipal offices, health clinics, band offices, and SMB professional services firms.

Spritz offers an economical, versatile and highly durable choice for the workplace and learning environment.

  • Task and Multi-Purpose models are standard with Global’s high quality Soft Descent™ pneumatic lift which slowly and gently lowers the seat height of the chair making it easy to obtain the exact seat height you desire.

body_html:
A square table that works as hard as the room it sits in — from focused solo work to impromptu team huddles.

The Newland Square Table — X-Base (model NL36SX) is a 36"D × 29"H multi-purpose worksurface built for the demands of a real office environment. The X-base design keeps sightlines open and legroom unobstructed, while a selection of finishes lets you match existing interiors without a custom order. Three height options mean you can spec the right configuration for standard seating, collaborative standing areas, or lounge-adjacent zones — all within the same product family.

Key features

  • Model code: NL36SX — 36"D × 29"H square table with X-base configuration.
  • Available in three height options to suit seated, collaborative, or café-height applications.
  • X-base frame design keeps floor space visually open and accommodates standard seating on all four sides.
  • Multiple finish selections available to coordinate with existing office or boardroom interiors.
  • Designed for multi-purpose use: independent workstations, informal meetings, and common-area socializing.
  • Commercial-grade construction suited to daily use in open-plan offices, training rooms, and staff lounges.

Who it's for

Office administrators and facilities managers at businesses, non-profits, health teams, and municipal offices who need a flexible, durable table solution that can shift between work modes without requiring furniture replacement. Well-suited for common areas, collaborative zones, and multi-use meeting spaces.

title: Table desk
body_html:
A clean, no-nonsense work surface built for private offices and open-plan environments that need reliable desking without the complexity.

The Newland Table Desk delivers straightforward, modular desking designed to work across a wide range of workspace applications — from private offices and open-plan settings to meeting and training spaces. The 1" thick thermally fused laminate top resists everyday wear, while the 2 mm matching edge banding keeps the finish consistent and professional. Freestanding construction means it integrates easily into new layouts or reconfigures as your team grows, without requiring a full system overhaul. Simple components, classic proportions, and durable materials make Newland a practical long-term investment for organizations that need dependable desking at a sensible price point.

Key features

  • Thermally fused laminate top, 1" thick, for durable everyday use.
  • 2 mm matching edge banding for a clean, consistent finish.
  • Freestanding construction supports flexible layout configurations.
  • Modular system compatible across private office, open-plan, meeting, and training environments.
  • Classic design built to stand the test of time in commercial settings.

Who it's for

Office administrators at non-profits, municipal offices, school boards, and small professional firms who need reliable, right-sized desking for standard workstations — without overcomplicating procurement or the floor plan.

Brant Business Interiors carries the full Newland desking line and delivers across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times, finish options, and free design layouts.

Offering a fresh approach to casegoods design, Byward™ is about doing more with less. title: Teknion Expansion
body_html:
• Overview
  • Features

Expansion® Casegoods offers a distinctive line of price-competitive laminate casegoods furniture suited to a broad range of freestanding applications and diverse office plans. A uniform product platform simplifies planning while sustaining a consistent aesthetic throughout the office.

Expansion Casegoods projects an image of quality at a competitive price. An extensive choice of styles and materials makes it easy to design classic or contemporary office suites tailored to budget requirements.

It creates efficient, highly functional workstations without compromising comfort or aesthetics. Designed to integrate the workplace, furniture and work tools into a harmonious whole, Expansion Casegoods delivers optimum function within each workspace.

The line was designed with exceptional versatility, Non-handed supports and universal hardware permit quick and easy installation and reconfiguration. Metal inserts also help to maintain structural integrity when product is reconfigured. In addition, an array of options fulfills design concepts at varying price levels.

Expansion Casegoods is an extensive product offering of over 26,000 components that can be combined and interchanged across the office, from single work desks to the executive suite and conference room.

title: Teknion Seating
body_html:
Teknion Seating is an infinitely classic, yet modern chair manufacturer. Visually sculptural in frame and profile, Features an innovative back structure symbolizing the interconnection of comfort and design.

Working at heights other than desk height has become increasingly more popular.  The  Swivel Stool chairs are ideal for counter height applications, traditional drafting, & some bar heights.

Nuova Contessa is a redesigned and enhanced version of Teknion’s classic Contessa task chair. A refined aesthetic, advanced adjustment mechanisms, increased strength and durability deliver uncompromised comfort and performance for diverse body types. The redesigned back and seat frame offer a lighter and thinner design, enhancing the chair’s sophistication and elegance across the work environment.

Nuova Contessa’s signature Smart Operation concept enables adjustments to be easily made while the user is seated. The task chair is offered as an all-mesh model or with mesh back and upholstered seat. Newly developed mesh combines yarns excellent in durability, texture, stretchability and strength.  Nuova Contessa represents a timeless refinement of function, comfort and style.

title: Teknion Untethered: go further, go anywhere by:
body_html:
Untethered is a product portfolio of mobile worktools equipped with battery packs to power your phone and laptop through an entire day. Like the ebike which gives you the power to go further and carry more, Untethered can extend your reach, your day, and your office.

While pulling power from the active battery, the backup is being charged and ready to pick up when you need it. Cobalt-free and UL Certified, the Untethered battery is non-toxic if punctured, and can be deconstructed for reuse of parts.

untethered battery

  • Rechargeable lithium iron phosphate battery provides long-lasting energy and also serves as a back-up power system
  • Contains no nickel or cobalt, making it harder to ignite in the event of mishandling
  • Features advanced Battery Management System
  • Exceptionally reliable with built-in battery management system, an intelligent self-monitoring safety feature
  • Free of heavy metals or other toxic substances, more environmentally friendly than lead-acid batteries
  • LED indicator on battery displays remaining capacity
  • Not prone to thermal runaway and keeps cool during operation.

untethered mobile charging cart

  • Charge up to 3 or 6 Untethered Batteries simultaneously with a maximum charging time of 2-3 hours to full battery capacity
  • Plugs into a typical North American 120V wall outlet without overage concerns with a maximum of 12 batteries per single circuit

title: Teknion Zones
body_html:
Zones is a comprehensive series of furniture products that transforms the office, challenging convention and changing the way people experience work. It comprises seating, tables, screens, easels and accessories, as well as semi-private enclosures which can act either as an intimate collaborative setting or as a place of retreat when privacy is desired. Zones’ breadth of offering across multiple workplace categories with a consistent design language makes it unique.

Influenced and inspired by the untethered, modern worker who seeks movement, flexibility and convenience, Zones transitions the workplace from one that’s fixed and formal to a space that suits a variety of preferences and working habits. Components can be combined in limitless ways to create flexible, fluid work areas that exist “in between” less adaptable areas like private offices, conference rooms and high-density workstations.

 

Wood is used as a modern engineering material ensuring strength, flexibility, sustainability, beauty, craft and humanity. The combination of wood with other materials, and Zones’ harmonious, soft design, emphasize the domesticity and materiality of the collection.

Zones addresses the needs for focus, collaborative and workshop areas within the office environment. Designed by PearsonLloyd in conjunction with Teknion, the Zones collection won several 2016 Best of NeoCon awards, including Best of Competition and a Gold. Zones Benches won Gold and Zones Tables earned Silver in the Best of NeoCon competition.

title: Terina training tables rectangular table — 8 sizes
body_html:
Training-room tables that get out of the way when the room needs to do something else.

The Terina™ rectangular training table is built for spaces that change purpose throughout the day. A single-handed flip-top mechanism lets one person reconfigure the room without tools or a second set of hands, and dual locking wheels mean the tables stay exactly where you put them. When the session is over, tables nest upright to keep your storage footprint as small as possible. Available in High Pressure Laminate in eight size options, the Terina™ works equally well as a seminar table, a temporary workstation, or an event surface.

Optional accessories extend the table's utility: ganging plates (model GFCNGFP) link tables into a continuous surface, wire management keeps power and data cables out of the way during presentations, and modesty panels add privacy where needed.

Key features

  • Single-handed flip-top mechanism for fast, tool-free reconfiguration.
  • Dual locking wheels for secure positioning during use.
  • Upright nesting design minimises storage space between sessions.
  • High Pressure Laminate surface — durable and easy to clean.
  • Available in 8 rectangular size options to suit varied room layouts.
  • Optional ganging plates (GFCNGFP) connect tables into a unified surface.
  • Optional wire management to route power and data cables cleanly.
  • Optional modesty panels available for added privacy.

Who it's for

Training coordinators, facilities managers, and administrative staff at school boards, municipal offices, health teams, and corporate training centres who need a flexible, easy-to-store table solution that one person can manage independently.

Available through Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc., a verified OECM Supplier Partner. Delivery and installation across Ontario. Call 1-800-835-9565 for OECM procurement pricing and current lead times.

title: The corby collection
body_html:
Introducing the Corby collection of wood veneer and laminate desks, tables and storage elements. Christopher Wright has reflected on the mid-century modern vernacular to design a unique series of workplace furnishings that reward a new generation of pioneers and nation builders.

 Corby detailing is new century modern with a knife edge on table tops.

  • Veneer tops are constructed from grade A veneers featuring solid walnut, cherry, oak and maple.
  • High pressure laminate surfaces are 1 3/8” thick  with 3mm matching PVC edge.
  • When veneer is specified, tapered, solid wood legs (walnut, cherry, oak and maple) are used to support the peninsula, work, collaboration and occasional tables.
  • When laminate is specified, tapered, solid poplar legs are used to support peninsula, work, collaboration and occasional tables.
  • Stack-on unit back panels are solid thermally fused laminate.
  • Pedestal, credenza and bookcase bottoms include 1 3/8” thick painted, beveled profile and tapered solid wood legs (4”H or 11 1/2”H).
  • Productivity Solutions by Global offers multiple desktop power options that can be retrofitted into grommets, or clamp mounting on the edge of worksurfaces. Under mount options provide a clean way to power accessories in storage cabinets.

title: Training flip top tables
body_html:
Training-room tables that get out of the way when the room needs to do something else.

Flip-top training tables are built for spaces that work harder than a single configuration. The top folds up, the locking casters roll, and the tables nest into a tight stack — each unit adding just 5.25" to the footprint — freeing the room in minutes. Available in three widths at a consistent 24" depth, these tables suit everything from boardroom breakouts to classroom instruction and seminar layouts. The 1" thermally fused laminate top is durable, easy to clean, and resistant to daily wear. Steel Y-legs with an integral modesty panel provide structural stability and a clean sightline, finished in a commercial-grade Tungsten powder coat. The single-lever flip mechanism locks automatically on both sides when the table is in the use position, so there's no guesswork during setup.

Key features

  • Available in 3 widths, all at 24" deep.
  • Single-lever flip mechanism with integrated dual side locking in the use position.
  • 1" thick thermally fused laminate top with factory-installed inserts for leg assembly connection.
  • Steel Y-legs with integral modesty panel, powder-coat painted in Tungsten finish.
  • Locking casters for easy repositioning and secure placement during use.
  • Nesting storage: each flipped table adds only 5.25" to the stack depth.
  • Ships in 3 cartons, designed for straightforward on-site assembly.

Who it's for

Office managers and facilities coordinators running multi-use training rooms, conference spaces, or seminar environments where reconfiguration speed matters. Also well suited to school boards, municipal offices, and non-profit organizations that need flexible meeting infrastructure on a procurement-friendly budget.

Available through Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc., a verified OECM Supplier Partner. Delivery and installation across Ontario. Call 1-800-835-9565 for OECM procurement pricing and lead times.

title: Vertical file 2 drawer letter — 2 drawer
body_html:
A metal vertical file that earns its floor space — built for busy offices that can't afford a filing cabinet that fights back.

The MVL25201 is a 2-drawer, letter-width vertical file cabinet designed for day-to-day document storage in working offices. At 25" deep, it fits comfortably in a standard filing alcove or alongside a workstation without dominating the room. Ball-bearing suspension means drawers open and close smoothly under load, and full-height side walls mean hanging file frames are unnecessary — just drop files in and get to work. A standard lock keeps sensitive documents secure, and the recessed angled full-width drawer pull gives you a confident grip without protruding into the aisle. An optional Follower Block is available to keep files upright in a partially filled drawer.

Key features

  • Model MVL25201: 2-drawer letter-width vertical file cabinet.
  • 25" depth fits standard filing positions alongside workstations or in storage alcoves.
  • Ball-bearing suspension for smooth, reliable drawer operation under load.
  • Full-height side walls eliminate the need for hanging file frames.
  • Recessed angled full-width drawer pull for a secure, comfortable grip.
  • Standard lock included for document security.
  • Optional Follower Block available to support upright filing in partially filled drawers.
  • Meets or exceeds ANSI/BIFMA standards for commercial-grade durability.

Who it's for

Office administrators, reception staff, and team leads in private-sector offices, non-profits, health teams, and municipal offices who need reliable letter-size document storage without added complexity.

The chair that keeps your back supported through an eight-hour day without making you think about it.

The VION Mesh High Back Chair is a multi-tilter task chair built for private offices and open-plan workstations where all-day seated work is the norm. title: Willow bariatric chair
body_html:
A bariatric chair designed for healthcare waiting areas where patient comfort and clinical durability both matter.

The Willow Bariatric Chair was developed in collaboration with patients and healthcare professionals, making it a practical choice for clinics, hospital waiting rooms, family health teams, and long-term care facilities. Its welcoming form supports heavier-capacity seating requirements without the institutional look that can make patients feel unwelcome. Built for the demands of high-traffic healthcare environments, the Willow holds up to the daily wear of a busy waiting area while remaining approachable and easy to clean.

Key features

  • Bariatric-rated construction designed for enhanced weight capacity in healthcare settings.
  • Developed with input from patients and healthcare professionals for real-world usability.
  • Welcoming, non-institutional aesthetic suited to patient-facing spaces.
  • Durable frame and upholstery materials built for high-traffic clinical environments.
  • Easy-clean surface finish appropriate for infection-control protocols.
  • Stable, four-leg base provides secure, ground-level seating for patients with mobility considerations.

Who it's for

Ideal for healthcare procurement coordinators sourcing seating for hospital waiting rooms, family health team lobbies, community health centres, and long-term care facilities where bariatric capacity and a patient-friendly appearance are both required.

Available through Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc., a verified OECM Supplier Partner. Delivery and installation across Ontario. Call 1-800-835-9565 for OECM procurement pricing and lead times.

title: Wood laminate storage cabinets
body_html:
Secure, organized storage built for offices that mean business.

Wood laminate storage cabinets offer a clean, professional look without sacrificing durability — a practical fit for private offices, administrative workrooms, and shared staff areas. Locking doors keep sensitive documents and supplies secure, while adjustable shelving lets you configure the interior to suit binders, equipment, or general office stock. These cabinets arrive assembled, so installation is straightforward and downtime is minimal. Made in Canada.

Key features

  • Locking doors for secure document and supply storage.
  • Adjustable shelves to accommodate varied storage needs.
  • Arrives fully assembled for easy placement.
  • Wood laminate construction for a durable, professional finish.
  • Made in Canada.

Who it's for

Office administrators, records coordinators, and facilities managers looking for reliable locking storage in a private office, back-of-house workroom, or shared staff area. A practical choice for non-profits, municipal offices, school board facilities, and professional services firms that need everyday storage that holds up to commercial use.

title: Aktivity Environ table
body_html:
A wood-grain worktable built for busy daycare rooms — without the solid-wood price tag.

The Aktivity Environ table brings a natural, warm aesthetic to early-learning and childcare environments. Its standout feature is a 2-inch diameter adjustable-height leg with a solid wood insert, giving it the look of a solid wood table while keeping costs manageable for institutional buyers. The tabletop is finished in high-pressure scratch-resistant laminate with a matching 3mm edgeband, available in Maple, Oak, and Cherry. The 1-inch thick, 45 lb high-density particle board core keeps the surface stable and durable through daily classroom use.

Key features

  • 1-inch thick, 45 lb high-density particle board core for lasting stability.
  • High-pressure scratch-resistant laminate surface withstands heavy daily use.
  • Chewing-gum resistant table backing for easy maintenance in childcare settings.
  • 2-inch diameter adjustable-height leg with solid wood insert for a natural wood appearance.
  • Matching 3mm edgeband for a finished, cohesive look.
  • Available in Maple, Oak, and Cherry wood-grain laminate finishes.

Who it's for

Daycare centres, early-learning programs, First Nations childcare facilities, and school board early-years classrooms looking for a durable, wood-look activity table that holds up to daily classroom demands.

Brant Business Interiors delivers and installs across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times and free design layouts.

images.alt: Aktivity Environ table - Brant Business Interiors

title: Aktivity Puddle
body_html:
A round activity table built for the floor where early learners actually work — spill-ready, safety-conscious, and sized for group engagement.

The Aktivity Puddle is a 60" diameter round table designed for daycare, early learning, and junior classroom environments where durability and child safety are non-negotiable. The high-pressure scratch-resistant laminate surface holds up to daily craft, sensory, and group activity sessions, while the chewing-gum-resistant table backing keeps the underside maintainable over years of use. A 3mm vinyl bonded edgeband and fully rounded corners reduce impact risk for younger users. Leg height adjusts between 17"–25" or 22"–30", making the Puddle adaptable as children grow — and an optional standing height range of 34"–42" is available for standing-height configurations.

Key features

  • 60" diameter round top with high-pressure scratch-resistant laminate surface.
  • Chewing-gum-resistant table backing for long-term underside maintenance.
  • 3mm vinyl bonded edgeband with fully rounded corners for child safety.
  • 16-gauge, 1.25" diameter steel tube frame with fully welded leg construction.
  • Laser-cut support bracket for added structural integrity.
  • Adjustable legs in two ranges: 17"–25" or 22"–30" to accommodate different age groups.
  • Optional standing height available: 34"–42".
  • Durable powder-coat finish with swivel floor glides for stable, level placement.

Who it's for

Daycare operators, early learning centres, and school board procurement teams sourcing activity tables that need to meet child safety requirements and stand up to high-frequency daily use. A practical choice for group work areas, sensory stations, and multi-purpose classroom settings.

Brant Business Interiors delivers and installs across Ontario from 5 locations. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current lead times and free design layouts.

title: Auditorium / Lecture Hall Seating
body_html:
Fixed seating built for the rooms that never stop being used.

Auditorium and lecture hall seating takes a different kind of punishment than any task chair or lounge piece — hundreds of occupants daily, years of continuous service, and no tolerance for squeaks, wobbles, or failed mechanisms. The Thesi series, designed by Giovanni Baccolini, addresses this with precision engineering focused on structural integrity and long-term reliability. Whether you are fitting out a university lecture hall, a municipal council chamber, a hospital auditorium, or a school board presentation room, these chairs are built to hold up through the full cycle of institutional use.

Key features

  • Precision-engineered frame construction designed for high-cycle, high-occupancy environments.
  • Innovative folding or fixed-position seat mechanisms suited to tiered and flat-floor auditorium layouts.
  • Durable materials selected for multi-shift institutional use with minimal maintenance requirements.
  • Designed by Giovanni Baccolini with attention to structural performance and long-term durability.
  • Suitable for fixed-row installation in lecture halls, auditoriums, council chambers, and presentation spaces.
  • Available in configurations to suit a range of row depths and aisle widths — confirm options with your representative.

Who it's for

School boards, colleges, universities, municipalities, and health-care organizations outfitting fixed-seating rooms that see daily, heavy use. Also suited to corporate training centres and boardrooms requiring tiered or banked seating arrangements.

Available through Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc., a verified OECM Supplier Partner. Delivery and installation across Ontario. Call 1-800-835-9565 for OECM procurement pricing and lead times.

images.alt: Auditorium / Lecture Hall Seating - Brant Business Interiors

title: Auditorium / Lecture Hall Seating My Space
body_html:
Fixed auditorium seating that holds up to daily lecture-hall use without sacrificing comfort or a clean sightline.

The MySpace chair is designed for high-density institutional environments where space is tight and durability is non-negotiable. Its compact profile makes it well-suited for lecture halls, auditoriums, seminar rooms, and community gathering spaces where every row counts. An adjustable backrest pitch and height let facilities teams dial in ergonomic fit across a broad range of users, while the choice of fully upholstered or wood finish versions means the chair adapts to the aesthetic requirements of the space rather than dictating them. Finish options are available in prestigious selections to match existing millwork or institutional colour schemes.

Key features

  • Compact footprint engineered for high-density, fixed-seating auditorium and lecture hall layouts.
  • Adjustable backrest pitch and height to accommodate varied user needs across large audiences.
  • Available fully upholstered or in a wood version — specify at time of order.
  • Customizable finish selections to coordinate with existing interior specifications.
  • Built for institutional environments with repeated daily use across multiple occupants.

Who it's for

School boards, colleges, universities, municipal council chambers, community centres, and non-profit organizations outfitting fixed-seating auditoriums or lecture halls. Also well-suited for hospital conference spaces and First Nations band offices requiring dignified, durable audience seating.

Available through Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc., a verified OECM Supplier Partner. Delivery and installation across Ontario. Call 1-800-835-9565 for OECM procurement pricing, finish samples, and current lead times.

title: GC Comet™ Bariatric Stacking Armchair (GC2180)
body_html:
A bariatric stacking chair built for healthcare environments that need durability, comfort, and the flexibility to reconfigure quickly.

The GC Comet™ Bariatric Stacking Armchair (GC2180) delivers the strength and stability clinical settings demand without sacrificing comfort for patients or guests. A waterfall front seat with flat profile and Ultracell foam supports extended sitting, while fully extended injection-moulded polypropylene armrests ease entry and exit — a practical detail in patient rooms and waiting areas alike. Multiple back profiles and height options allow the chair to be configured to suit the specific space and application, whether that is a busy outpatient clinic, a community health centre, or an activity room. When seating is no longer needed, the GC2180 stacks cleanly for compact, out-of-the-way storage.

Key features

  • Model GC2180 — bariatric-rated stacking armchair designed for healthcare and institutional environments.
  • Waterfall front seat with flat profile and Ultracell foam for all-day seated comfort.
  • Fully extended injection-moulded polypropylene armrests with flat profile to assist entry and exit.
  • Multiple back profiles and height options available to suit different space configurations.
  • Stacking design allows efficient, space-saving storage when chairs are not in use.
  • Compact footprint suited for patient rooms, waiting areas, auditoriums, and activity seating.

Who it's for

Healthcare facilities, community health teams, First Nations band offices, municipalities, and any institutional buyer sourcing durable, accessible guest or patient seating in quantity.

Available through Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc., a verified OECM Supplier Partner. Delivery and installation available across Ontario. Call 1-800-835-9565 for OECM procurement pricing and lead times.

title: Global Recliner Primacare GC3608MRC
body_html:
A recliner built for care environments where comfort, safety, and durability all have to show up at once.

The Global Primacare GC3608MRC is purpose-built for acute care and long-term care settings, where seating takes more daily use than in almost any other environment. Designed as a full-featured healthcare recliner, the Primacare line sets a practical benchmark for both patient and resident seating — offering a broad range of configuration options suited to the varied demands of clinical and residential care facilities.

Key features

  • Model GC3608MRC — designed for acute care and long-term care applications.
  • Full reclining function supports patient rest, recovery, and repositioning.
  • Healthcare-grade upholstery suitable for clinical cleaning protocols.
  • Extensive configuration options across the Primacare series to match facility needs.
  • Built to withstand high-frequency daily use in demanding care environments.
  • Suitable for both bedside and lounge-area placement within healthcare facilities.

Who it's for

Procurement and facilities teams at hospitals, long-term care homes, and residential care facilities sourcing durable, clinical-grade seating for patient rooms, recovery areas, and resident lounges. Also relevant for First Nations health centres and community care organizations outfitting patient-facing spaces.

Available through Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc., a verified OECM Supplier Partner. Delivery and installation available across Ontario. Call 1-800-835-9565 for OECM procurement pricing and current lead times.

title: Nesting Training Table (8 Colour Choices)
body_html:
Training-room tables that get out of the way when the room needs to do something else.

The OSP Furniture Nesting Training Table is built for spaces that work harder than one layout allows. A single-lever folding mechanism drops the top flat in seconds, and dual-wheel casters let you roll units together into a compact nested stack — freeing up the floor for the next use. The one-inch laminate top with impact-resistant PVC edge banding handles daily wear in high-traffic classrooms, boardrooms, and event centres, and eight colour choices mean you can match an existing scheme or standardize across multiple rooms.

Key features

  • Single-lever folding mechanism for fast, one-person setup and breakdown.
  • Dual-wheel casters for smooth rolling and compact nesting storage.
  • 1-inch laminate work surface with impact-resistant PVC edge banding.
  • Available in 8 colour choices to coordinate with existing interiors.
  • Modular design allows multiple units to be arranged for meetings, training sessions, or conference configurations.
  • Suited for schools, offices, event centres, and other commercial applications.

Who it's for

School boards, training coordinators, municipal facilities teams, and office managers who need flexible seating arrangements that can be reconfigured quickly and stored efficiently between uses.

Available through Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc., a verified OECM Supplier Partner. Delivery and installation across Ontario. Call 1-800-835-9565 for OECM procurement pricing and lead times.

title: Sidero Tablet Arm
body_html:
Sidero™

Multi-purpose seating with a sculptured look, featuring wide curved arms and a round tubular steel frame.

  • Four-legged side chairs are "wall safe". Rear legs hit the baseboard first leaving clearance between the back of the chair and the wall, saving both the chair and the wall from damage.
  • Arms are wide and full length, offering support to help stabilize users as they sit or exit the chair. The gently curved arms are made from incredibly strong fiberglass reinforced nylon. Armless models are available.
  • Sidero is equipped with a polypropylene seat shroud that helps stabilize chairs when stacked and avoid frame imprints on upholstered seats.
  • Four-legged models stack up to five high on the floor or eight high on a dolly (6909 stacks up to four high on floor only).
  • Models with casters stack 3 high on the floor. Stools and sled base models do not stack.
  • Designed by Zooey Chu.

images.alt: Sidero Tablet Arm - Brant Business Interiors

title: Student Desk Carol Single & Double Sided
body_html:
Creating active learning zones to focus and grow.

CAROLTM is a versatile collection of study carrels built for today’s learning and working environments. Modern educational and working spaces have a need for multiple zones that create flexibility and accommodate multiple forms of working and learning styles. CAROL provides both a space for students to work independently, there-by supporting a crucial step in their academic progression; and for workers to touch down for a full work day, or simply a quick meeting or video call. Single or dual sided carrels are available in a variety of sizes and are configurable as freestanding or linking units, optimizing both flexibility and function in modern working and learning spaces.

title: The Foster Recliner
body_html:
The Foster Patient Recliner offers features that speak to the emphasis placed on the patient experience, such as, sloped arms, rounded arm caps for ingress and egress optimization, passive built-in lumbar support, infinite recline, dual density seat suspension with molded foam and sinuous springs, and an ergonomic footrest.

Promoting connection for family members, the Foster Patient Recliner is also able to lay flat, given the footrest and back work independently, to provide a comfortable sleeping alternative. It's modern design is also inviting, and due to the limitless upholstery options, it is a positive addition to any healthcare environment.

Features:

  • Features such as the ability to mount chair controls on the left or right side, dual side central brake and steer levers and pivoting arms that allow side access to the patient, speak to the emphasis placed on the caregivers experience.
  • Pivoting armrests - dual sides
  • Ergonomic passive lumbar support
  • Removable back and seat covers
  • Grey polyurethane accents
  • Right side (seated) footrest lever (optional left side)
  • Independent back and footrest control
  • Optional central brake and steer, push bar, reverse incline
  • Tablet left or right (footrest lever required on opposite side)
  • IV Pole with optional Foley Hook: left, right or dual
  • Independent Foley Hook: left, right or dual

Dimensions:

OVERALL: 49" H x 30" W x 32" D
SEAT: 20" H x 24" W x 25" D
BACK: 49" H from Floor x 29" H from Seat x 24" W
ARM HEIGHT: 28" H from Floor
ARM HEIGHT: 8" H from Seat
RECLINED: 77"L

Fabric:

200+ textiles to choose from
COM FULL: 8.25 yds
COM UPPER [BACK + ARMS]: 4.25 yds
COM LOWER [SEAT, SIDE PANELS + FOOTREST]: 4 yds
COM HEADREST [WILL MATCH UPPER]: 0.75yds

Note: When graded in combination upholstery is selected, pricing defaults to the highest grade upholstery selected.

Warranty:

10 year comprehensive parts and labor, with weight limit of 500 lbs.  

Priced without IV and tablet. 

Available in 100's of colours
